1461100044.english: No matter how much we treat you like an idiot... Still, the fact that she led her subordinates suggests...&nEven with just that one thing, you already have enough of your own strengths.
1461100044.korean: 우리가 널 아무리 바보 취급하지만... 그래도 부하들을 이끈 걸 보면... &n그거 하나로도 넌 충분히 너만의 장점이 있다.

1461100045.english: If you want to change how I think of you, strive to become a trusted subordinate of Master yourself.
1461100045.korean: 만약 너에 대한 생각을 바꾸고 싶다면 스스로 주인님께 신뢰받는 부하가 될 수 있도록 노력해라.

1461100047.english: I didn't tell you this to be thanked, but so I can show a different side of myself starting tomorrow.
1461100047.korean: 감사 받으려고 너한테 말한 건 아니니, 내일부터 달라진 모습을 보일 수 있도록.

1461100049.english: - A few days later, when I stopped by the casino, Fafnir was still losing chips from her seat.
1461100049.korean: - 며칠 후, 카지노에 들렸을 때도 파프니르는 앉은 자리에서 칩을 잃고 있었다.

1461100051.english: - I pulled up a chair and sat beside her, but Fafnir, who hadn't noticed me, still had her gaze fixed on the cards.
1461100051.korean: - 의자를 끌고 옆에 앉았지만 날 의식하지 못한 파프니르의 시선은 여전히 카드를 향해 있었다.

1461100052.english: - Fafnir glanced at me briefly, as if asking for help with my voice.&nHowever, she shook her head, hid her cards so I couldn't interfere, and continued betting. In the end, she lost the game.
1461100052.korean: - 파프니르는 내 목소리에 잠시 도와달라는 듯 슬쩍 이쪽을 쳐다보았다.&n하지만 고개를 내젓더니 내가 개입할 수 없게 카드를 감추고 배팅을 이어갔고, 끝내 게임에서 패배하고 말았다.

1461100053.english: Fafnir~ You've improved a bit today, haven't you? I think we can win tomorrow!
1461100053.korean: 파프니르~ 오늘은 좀 늘었는데? 내일이면 이길 수 있겠어!

1461100054.english: Fafnir, let's do it this time, okay?

1461100055.english: You guys are trying to take all my chips right now, aren't you?
1461100055.korean: 이것들이, 너희들 지금 내 칩 다 뺏으려고 그러는 거지?

1461100056.english: Oh, you've really started to get the hang of reading people, haven't you?

1461100057.english: It's okay. She's going to get ahead of herself again and make a bold bet, that's for sure.
1461100057.korean: 괜찮아. 또 설레발 쳐서 배짱 배팅 할 게 뻔해.

1461100058.english: - In the end, I sat in her place and continued Fafnir's poker game, dedicating myself to recovering my depleted chips.
1461100058.korean: - 결국 나는 그녀의 자리에 앉아 파프니르의 포커를 이어갔고, 바닥난 칩을 복구하는 일에 전념하게 됐다.

1461100059.english: Are you here again because you're worried about me?

1461100061.english: - To be honest, I was bored because Dragon and Alpha had practically forced me to hand over the panel, but I was also somewhat concerned about Fafnir's tears.
1461100061.korean: - 사실 용과 알파에게 패널을 반 강제로 압수당해 무료한 것도 있었지만, 파프니르의 눈물이 어딘가 신경이 쓰이는 것도 있었다.

1461100063.english: She's not as decisive as JangHwa or CheonA, nor as serious as Vargr.
1461100063.korean: 장화나 천아 같이 똑 부러진 것도 아니고… 바르그처럼 진지한 모습도 없고.

1461100064.english: Huh...? What do you mean by that?

1461100065.english: - Of course, Fafnir's personality was different from the other Empress Hound members.
1461100065.korean: - 물론 파프니르는 다른 엠프레시스 하운드 대원들과는 성격이 달랐다.

1461100066.english: - However, thanks to that personality, she was the cute mood maker of the Empress Hounds and could be a trustworthy and honest leader trusted by her subordinates.
1461100066.korean: - 하지만 그 성격 덕에 엠프레시스 하운드의 귀여운 분위기 메이커였고 부하들에게 신임받는 거짓 없는 대장이 될 수 있었다.

1461100069.english: H-hmph! Fine! Then hurry and help me win some gold coins!
1461100069.korean: 흐, 흥! 좋아! 그럼 어서 내가 금화를 딸 수 있게 도와줘!

1461100070.english: And I have something I want to do, so come back here tomorrow.
1461100070.korean: 그리고 나 하나 하고 싶은 거 생겼어, 내일 그러니까 다시 여기 와.

1461100072.english: - As if recalling something in her mind, Fafnir's tail swayed gently with pleasure.
1461100072.korean: - 무언가를 머릿속에서 떠올리는 듯, 파프니르의 꼬리는 기분 좋게 살랑거렸다.

1461100074.english: Fafnir, you shouldn't talk about things like that.
1461100074.korean: 파프니르, 그런 건 이야기하면 안 돼.

1461100075.english: ...Well, after being tricked several times, you naturally learn it by instinct.
1461100075.korean: …글쎄 여러 번 당해보면 자연스럽게 몸으로 익히게 돼.

1461100076.english: Shall we stop here for today?

1461100081.english: Hmm... the cute youngest member of the Empress Hound?

1461100082.english: Orca, the fixer who always comes through when it matters?
1461100082.korean: 중요할 때마다 한 건 하는 오르카 해결사?

1461100086.english: I came because it's nice to see you winning the game and smiling.
1461100086.korean: 네가 게임에서 이기고 웃는 게 보기 좋아서 왔어.

1461100089.english: Yeah, so don't worry about it.

1461100090.english: I'm helping because I want to. Not because I feel sorry for you.
1461100090.korean: 내가 좋아서 도와주는 거야. 불쌍해서가 아니라.

1461100091.english: What I want to do...? What's that?

1471100001.english: Master, you've been frequenting the casino quite a bit lately... Could it be that you're trying to win the 2-night, 3-day travel voucher yourself?
1471100001.korean: 주인님, 요즘 카지노에 상당히 많이 출입하시던데… 혹시 2박 3일 여행권을 직접 차지하시려는 속셈은 아니시겠죠?

1471100002.english: I must tell you, the travel vouchers only expire if used by a member of the Orca crew, right?&nDid you forget that if Master happens to win a prize, it will be extended to the next season and upgraded to a 4-night, 5-day pass?
1471100002.korean: 말씀드리지만, 여행권은 오르카호 소속 대원이 써야 소멸하는 겁니다? &n혹시나 주인님이 경품을 받게 되거든, 다음 시즌으로 연장돼 4박5일 권으로 업그레이드 된다는 걸 잊으신 겁니까?

1471100003.english: If you're really bored, why don't you go and try for even the lower-tier prizes?
1471100003.korean: 정 심심하시면, 가서 하위권 경품이라도 한 번 노려보시지 그러세요?

1471100005.english: - It seems Alpha has no intention of giving us the panel after all.
1471100005.korean: -아무래도 알파는 끝내 패널을 주지 않을 생각인가 보다.

1471100006.english: - Tired of spending the day idly in the captain's cabin, I eventually made my way to the casino.
1471100006.korean: -함장실에서 무료하게 하루를 보내는 것이 싫어, 결국 카지노로 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1471100007.english: - Come to think of it, did Fafnir come today?

1471100008.english: - I looked around, but since there was no sign of her usual shouting, I guess she didn't come for once.
1471100008.korean: - 주변을 두리번 거렸지만 특유의 고함이 없는 걸 보니 웬일로 오지 않았나 보다.

1471100009.english: - Having no choice, I sat down to kill time, exchanged my chips, and was about to join the game when...
1471100009.korean: - 하는 수 없이 시간이라도 때울 요령으로 자리에 앉아 칩을 바꾸고 게임에 참가하려던 순간,

1471100010.english: - A woman in a blue dress sat down across from me.
1471100010.korean: - 파란 드레스를 입은 한 여자가 내 맞은 편에 앉았다.

1471100011.english: Fufu, this outfit today is a lucky one I bought with tuna cans I've been saving up.
1471100011.korean: 후후, 오늘 이 옷은 특별히 그동안 직접 모아둔 참치캔으로 산 행운의 옷이야.

1471100012.english: I'm going to spend all the money I have left today to battle you. All the gold coins are mine!
1471100012.korean: 오늘 남은 돈, 모두 너랑 대결하기 위해 쓸 거야. 금화는 모두 내 거라고!

1471100013.english: - Somehow, Fafnir's atmosphere feels different today. It feels like they're trying to do something with all their might...
1471100013.korean: - 어쩐지 오늘은 파프니르의 분위기가 심상치 않다. 전력을 다해 무언가 하려는 느낌인데…

1471100014.english: - I received my cards from Armand with a nervous expression and started betting.
1471100014.korean: - 나는 긴장한 표정으로 아르망에게서 패를 받고 배팅을 시작했다.

1471100015.english: Straight. It's your victory, Your Majesty.

1471100016.english: Ha, haha! Not bad for a first try, huh? But that's where your luck ends!
1471100016.korean: 하, 하하! 첫 시작 치곤 좋네? 하지만 그걸로 운은 끝이야!

1471100017.english: Two pair. As expected, it is Your Majesty's victory.

1471100019.english: Fafnir, what did I say...? Forget about clothes, let's just focus on improving our skills, okay?&nWhat kind of bluff is that with no pair?
1471100019.korean: 파프니르, 내가 뭐라 했어... 옷이고 뭐고를 떠나서 실력이나 더 키우고 오자니까? &n노페어로 무슨 블러핑이야?

1471100020.english: Lose? I'm seeing it properly, aren't I? Red things go with red things. Black things go with black things...
1471100020.korean: 패? 제, 제대로 보고 있잖아! 빨간 거는 빨간 거끼리. 검은 건 검은 거끼리…

1471100021.english: Triple... As expected, Your Majesty's luck is truly extraordinary, exceeding my predictions.
1471100021.korean: 트리플… 역시 폐하의 운은 제 예측을 벗어날 정도로 대단하시군요.

1471100023.english: Don't just blindly raise the stakes... Read the flow of the hand properly!
1471100023.korean: 무식하게 판돈만 키우지 말고... 패 흐름을 제대로 읽으라고!

1471100024.english: Strategy?! Hey, I'm doing it! Red things go with red things. Black things go with black things...
1471100024.korean: 전략?! 하, 하고 있잖아! 빨간 거는 빨간 거끼리. 검은 건 검은 거끼리…

1471100025.english: Honestly speaking... Fafnir, you still don't fully understand poker hands, do you?
1471100025.korean: 솔직히 말해… 파프니르, 너 포커 족보 아직도 제대로 이해 못했지?

1471100027.english: - Fafnir's play, where she even offered up the chips I had helped her win, was absolutely jaw-dropping.
1471100027.korean: - 내가 같이 따줬던 칩까지 그대로 헌납하는 파프니르의 플레이는 입이 떡 벌어질 정도였다.

1471100028.english: Ugh... just be honest. You're just showering the commander with thanks for playing with you all this time, right?
1471100028.korean: 하아… 그냥 솔직히 말해. 그냥 사령관님께 여태껏 같이 놀아줘서 고맙다고 퍼주는 거지?

1471100029.english: No, it's not! Do it again! This time, I really think we can win!
1471100029.korean: 아니거든?! 다시 해! 이번엔 정말 이길 수 있을 거라고!

1471100030.english: Lord Fafnir. I'm sorry, but it seems you don't have any more chips to bet.
1471100030.korean: 파프니르 님. 죄송하지만 더는 배팅하실 칩이 없으신 것 같은데요?

1471100031.english: Huh? Huh? Oh, it's not there?! Okay, just a moment... wait! I'll go borrow it!
1471100031.korean: 어? 에? 어, 없어?! 자, 잠깐만… 기다려! 나 빌려올 테니까!

1471100032.english: No way, I can't stand to lose! So just sit down and wait!
1471100032.korean: 싫어, 난 지고 못 살아! 그러니까 딱 앉아서 기다리라고!

1471100033.english: - It wasn't long before Fafnir, having stacked up the borrowed chips, came out and challenged me to a rematch... but she didn't even get a good hand and her borrowed chips were almost gone.
1471100033.korean: - 파프니르는 얼마 지나지 않아, 빌려온 칩들을 쌓아놓곤 나와 제대결을 신청했지만… 좋은 패를 잡지도 못한 채 빌려 온 칩도 거의 바닥을 보이고 말았다.

1471100035.english: - Perhaps this is truly the final showdown. Fafnir swallowed hard, then immediately offered up all her remaining chips.
1471100035.korean: - 어쩌면 정말 마지막이 될 수 있는 승부, 파프니르는 군침을 꿀꺽 삼키더니 이내 남은 칩들을 전부 내밀었다.

1471100036.english: Even if I can't eat it, I'm in!

1471100037.english: No, Fafnir, are you seriously crazy?! Now it's really bankruptcy, bankruptcy!
1471100037.korean: 아니, 파프니르, 진짜 미쳤어?! 이젠 정말 파산이라고 파산!

1471100038.english: This time, I really have a good feeling about it. Just trust me!
1471100038.korean: 이번엔 정말 느낌 좋아. 나만 믿어!

1471100039.english: - Sterling flinched at Fafnir's stern voice.

1471100040.english: - Seeing Fafnir's confident expression, her unusually self-assured demeanor, I also made up my mind.
1471100040.korean: - 파프니르의 확신에 가득 찬 표정, 여느 때와 다르게 자신감 넘치는 모습을 보자 나도 마음을 굳혔다.

1471100041.english: Of course! I'm going all-in with all my remaining chips!

1471100042.english: Fafnir-sama, you're truly amazing... Heh heh.

1471100043.english: - I mulled over Armand's enigmatic words, and to appease Fafnir, I too bet everything I had.
1471100043.korean: - 아르망의 알 듯 모를 듯한 말을 되새김질했고, 파프니르의 기분을 맞춰주기 위해 나 역시 가진 전부를 배팅했다.

1471100044.english: Wow... If I just win this game, I'll be able to ring the Golden Bell in no time!
1471100044.korean: 우와... 이 게임에서 이기기만 하면, 순식간에 1등 골든벨 하겠는데?

1471100045.english: My hands are shaking too. This is the first time I've seen chips of this magnitude being exchanged.
1471100045.korean: 저도 손이 떨리네요. 이렇게 어마어마한 칩이 왔다갔다 하는 건 처음이에요.

1471100046.english: - Before I knew it, the Orca members who had been playing in the casino had gathered around Fafnir and me.
1471100046.korean: - 어느새 카지노에서 놀던 오르카 대원들이 파프니르와 나의 주변으로 몰려들었다.

1471100047.english: - On the table, where tension had brought silence, Armand slowly flipped over her cards and opened her mouth as her eyes met Fafnir's.
1471100047.korean: - 긴장감으로 정막이 된 테이블 위, 파프니르와의 눈이 마주치자 아르망이 천천히 패를 뒤집으며 입을 열었다.

1471100048.english: Fufut… understood. I'll reveal the hands. Your Majesty's hand is a straight…
1471100048.korean: 후훗...알겠습니다. 패를 공개하도록 하겠습니다. 폐하의 패는 스트레이트…

1471100049.english: Hhiiiik… if it's a straight… did I lose again?
1471100049.korean: 흐이익… 스트레이트면… 또… 나 진 거야?

1471100050.english: - Fafnir placed down her cards with trembling hands.

1471100051.english: Fafnir-sama's hand is a royal straight flush. This match is the victory of Lord Fafnir.
1471100051.korean: 파프니르 님의 패는 로열 스트레이트 플러시. 이 승부는 파프니르 님의 승리입니다.

1471100052.english: - Armand's smile, perhaps Armand wasn't surprised because she had predicted Fafnir's move in advance.
1471100052.korean: - 아르망의 미소, 어쩌면 아르망은 파프니르의 패를 미리 예측했기에 놀라지 않았던 것 같았다.

1471100053.english: This... we won, we won?! Really? Wow... Fafnir, I won't call you an idiot anymore... You actually won this?
1471100053.korean: 이… 이겼, 이겼어?! 진짜? 와…파프니르, 빡통이란 말 이제 안 할게… 진짜 이걸 이기네?

1471100054.english: Fafnir stood up and walked toward me with a confident stride, then sat on the table.
1471100054.korean: 파프니르는 자리에서 일어나 내게 당당한 걸음으로 걸어와, 테이블에 걸터앉았다.

1471100055.english: Ahahaha! This is me! I save it for when it really matters!
1471100055.korean: 아하하하하! 이게 나야! 중요할 때 터트린다고!

1471100056.english: - Fafnir was always called a reckless fool by those around her.
1471100056.korean: - 파프니르는 늘 주변에서 무모한 바보라는 소리를 들었다.

1471100057.english: - But I thought she was a gambler who could turn that recklessness into success.
1471100057.korean: - 하지만 나는 그 무모함을 성공으로 이끄는 승부사란 생각이 들었다.

1471100058.english: - Because she ultimately performed a miracle that even I couldn't have imagined.
1471100058.korean: - 이렇게 나조차 생각지도 못한 기적을 그녀는 결국 일으켰기 때문이었다.

1471100059.english: - I gently stroked Fafnir's soft hair, enjoying the feeling.
1471100059.korean: - 나는 파프니르의 부드러운 머릿결을 기분 좋게 쓱쓱 쓰담아주었다.

1471100060.english: Even in this situation, you're still treating me like a child? Ee...
1471100060.korean: 너 이런 상황에서도, 날 애 취급하는 거야? 이이…

1471100062.english: - Rather than being ashamed of her foolishness, it is by proudly showing how she transforms it into her charm that Fafnir truly embodies herself.
1471100062.korean: - 자신의 바보같음을 부끄러워하기 보단, 있는 그대로를 자신의 매력으로 승화한 모습을 당당히 보여주는 것이야말로 파프니르 그 자체이다.

1471100063.english: Tsk... really not saying a word...
1471100063.korean: 치이… 진짜 아무런 말도 안 하고…

1471100064.english: - Fafnir looked up at me and then opened her mouth.
1471100064.korean: - 파프니르는 나를 올려다보더니 이내 입을 열었다.

1471100065.english: I had a lot to say to you.

1471100066.english: I didn't want to look like a fool or a child to you anymore.
1471100066.korean: 너한테 더는 모지리나, 어린애처럼 보이고 싶지도 않았고.

1471100067.english: I really wanted you to see me as a smart and reliable woman, at least for you...
1471100067.korean: 너한테만큼은 똑똑하고 믿음직한 여자로 인정 받고 싶었는데…

1471100068.english: Stop getting yelled at by Sterling... and stop throwing tantrums like this, damn it.
1471100068.korean: 스털링한테 혼도 그만 나고… 씨이, 이렇게 떼도 그만 쓰고.

1471100069.english: I really wanted to show them a big blow...
1471100069.korean: 크게 한 방 먹이는 모습 보여주고 싶었는데…

1471100070.english: ...I really wanted to show a slightly different side of myself, even if it meant going to those lengths.
1471100070.korean: …그렇게 해서라도 조금 달라진 모습 좀 보여주고 싶었는데.

1471100071.english: - Fafnir fought her own way and ultimately landed an unexpected blow.
1471100071.korean: - 파프니르는 자신만의 방법으로 승부를 걸었고, 결국 예기치 못한 한 방을 꽂아넣었다.

1471100072.english: - That was Fafnir's way, her own way of playing the game.
1471100072.korean: - 그것이 파프니르의 방법이었고 그녀만의 승부 방식이었다.

1471100073.english: - I decided to go around the casino with Fafnir, who was wearing beautiful clothes, and congratulate her.
1471100073.korean: - 나는 아름다운 옷을 입은 파프니르와 함께 카지노를 돌아다니며 그녀를 축하해주기로 했다.

1471100074.english: - Now that she had achieved what she wanted, I was about to leave when Fafnir grabbed my hand.
1471100074.korean: - 그녀가 원하는 바를 이루었으니 이제 그만 자리를 비켜주려던 내 손을 파프니르가 붙잡았다.

1471100075.english: You know, I wasn't really trying to compete to get the gold.
1471100075.korean: 나 말이야 사실 황금 얻으려고 승부하잔 건 아니었어.

1471100076.english: Yeah. I've always told you. My precious gold is none other than you.
1471100076.korean: 응. 늘 말했잖아. 내 소중한 황금은 다름 아닌 너라고.

1471100077.english: So... Today's match was purely me going all-in to win you over.
1471100077.korean: 그러니까... 오늘 승부는 순전히 널 차지하기 위해서 올인한 거야.

1471100078.english: - I never expected such an unexpected answer to come from Fafnir, and Fafnir chuckled and wagged her tail.
1471100078.korean: - 의외의 대답이 파프니르에게서 나올 줄은 몰랐고 파프니르는 씩 웃으며 꼬리를 흔들었다.

1471100079.english: - As the lights dimmed and then tried to turn back on to celebrate the jackpot table, electricity crackled around Fafnir's tail.
1471100079.korean: - 잭팟 테이블 축하를 위해 조명이 꺼진 후 다시 켜지려 하자, 파프니르의 꼬리 주변에선 전기가 방출되었다.

1471100080.english: - I might get disciplined later for causing an unnecessary power outage at the facility, but...
1471100080.korean: - 나중에 시설에 쓸데 없이 정전을 일으켰다고 징계 당할 일이 생길 지도 모르겠지만…

1471100081.english: How's the front tail condition? Didn't I say I love lying on gold the most?
1471100081.korean: 앞꼬리 상태는 어때? 나 황금 위에 눕는 거 제일 좋아한다고 했지?

1471100082.english: Alright, the golden...? Come on, lie down under me.
1471100082.korean: 자, 황금…? 어서, 내 밑으로 누워보라고.

1471100083.english: - I finally couldn't hold back and wrapped my arms around Fafnir's waist, pushing her down onto the table.
1471100083.korean: - 나는 결국 참지 못하고 파프니르의 허리를 팔로 휘감으며 테이블 위에 눕혀버렸다.

1471100084.english: Aaaah! Isn't that too rough?! I won today!
1471100084.korean: 꺄악! 너무 거친 거 아냐?! 오늘은 내가 이겼는데!

1471100085.english: Especially for today, I, the goddess of fortune, will allow it...
1471100085.korean: 특별히 이 행운의 여신인 내가 오늘 만큼은… 허락해주도록 할게.

1471100086.english: - A few days later, I heard that Fafnir was working as a diva at the Orca Casino, so I visited with Vargr.
1471100086.korean: - 며칠 후, 나는 파프니르가 오르카 카지노의 디바로 일한다는 소식을 듣고 바르그와 함께 방문했다.

1471100088.english: ...Hmph, hmm! No... it's just that, as the leader, I feel something because that idiot seems to have grown a bit.
1471100088.korean: …흐, 흐음! 아닙니다… 그냥, 저 바보가 그래도 한층 성장한 것 같아 대장으로써 느끼는 게 있을 뿐입니다.

1471100089.english: - Sitting with Vargr and the chair, I quietly watched Fafnir sing.
1471100089.korean: - 바르그와 의자에 앉아, 파프니르가 노래를 부르는 모습을 조용히 지켜보았다.

1471100090.english: I never thought her tone would sound so serious...
1471100090.korean: 그녀의 음색이 이렇게나 진지하게 느껴질 줄이야…

1471100091.english: Perhaps it's because of another charm that contrasts with Fafnir's usual cheerful and bright demeanor?
1471100091.korean: 파프니르 특유의 쾌활하고 밝은 모습과 대조되는 또다른 매력 때문이겠지?

1471100092.english: On stage, Fafnir was a confident figure, throwing her own joker at the world.
1471100092.korean: 무대 위의 파프니르는 세상을 향해 그녀만의 조커를 던지는 자신감 넘치는 모습이었다.

1471100094.english: How about we change it so that if I win, I get to spin the panel?
1471100094.korean: 내가 1등하면 패널을 돌려주는 걸로 바꾸는 건 어때?

1471100095.english: It's just better to admit defeat...

1471100096.english: Fafnir, are you confident you can win the game?

1471100097.english: Okay, I'll look forward to it, Fafnir.

1471100099.english: Yeah, I like that look because it's just like Fafnir.
1471100099.korean: 그래, 딱 그 모습이 파프니르 같아서 좋아.

1471100100.english: I've already gotten the upper hand. You've changed enough.
1471100100.korean: 이미 한 방 먹였어. 충분히 달라졌잖아.

1471100102.english: We're treating the winner with the utmost respect.

1471100103.english: What's up, Vargr? Are you jealous?

1480000001.english: Phew... If it weren't for you, CheonA, today would have been really tough.
1480000001.korean: 후우… 천아씨 아니었다면 오늘 정말 힘들었을 거예요.

1480000002.english: What is this? Why did you ask the main branch to come all the way here for backup? And why are there so many people?
1480000002.korean: 뭔데 본점까지 지원 와달라고 한 거야? 사람은 또 왜 이렇게 많고?

1480000003.english: Today is the last day of the Steel Line winter training, so I ended up borrowing CheonA's hand.
1480000003.korean: 오늘은 스틸라인 혹한기 훈련이 끝나는 날이라 천아 씨 손을 빌리게 됐어요.

1480000004.english: I wonder if the little puppy and Redie can manage without me? No... I think it'll be fine if Merlin is here...
1480000004.korean: 똥강아지랑 빨강이 둘이서 나 없이 잘 할 수 있으려나? &n아니다… 멀린이 있으면 괜찮을 것 같은데…

1480000005.english: Mr. Stronghold said he would help, so it should be fine.
1480000005.korean: 스트롱홀드 씨도 도와주신다고 했으니 괜찮을 거예요.

1480000006.english: Phew, at least I won't be busy once this work is over, right? Things aren't going to get any more complicated from here...
1480000006.korean: 후우, 그래도 당장 일만 지나면 안 바쁜 거지? 여기서 뭔가 더 일이 커지지는...

1480000007.english: Today's gourmet menu features cold brew made directly with Geisha beans and strawberry cassatay.
1480000007.korean: 오늘의 미식 메뉴는 게이샤 원두로 직접 내린 콜드블루와 딸기 카사타야.

1480000008.english: Strawberries even in winter. I'm so happy...

1480000009.english: It's going to be a calorie bomb, but... I really can't stand it... Hehe...
1480000009.korean: 칼로리 폭탄이긴 하겠지만… 정말 못 참겠네요… 헤헤…

1480000010.english: Hehe, I wonder how much it will delight our mouths...
1480000010.korean: 후후, 우리 입을 얼만큼 즐겁게 해줄지...

1480000011.english: While you're at it, why not try a tart made with blueberries sourced from Caracas?
1480000011.korean: 이참에 카라카스에서 공수한 블루베리로 만든 타르트도 먹어보는 게 어떨까요?

1480000012.english: I like it... Aurora has been so busy lately that I haven't really had anything to enjoy.
1480000012.korean: 저는 좋아요… 요즘 아우로라님이 바빠서 영 입이 즐거울 일이 통 없었는데.

1480000013.english: Ah, I would prefer milk tea made with black tea sourced from Assam rather than coffee.
1480000013.korean: 아, 저는 커피보단 아삼에서 공수한 홍차로 만든 밀크티가 좋겠어요.

1480000014.english: Djinnia is scheduled to join soon, too. Let's order the extra portion as well.
1480000014.korean: 조금 있으면 지니야도 합류할 예정이야. 추가 분까지 같이 시켜두자고.

1480000016.english: By any chance, haven't you heard the saying that a loose tongue is the problem, CheonA?
1480000016.korean: 혹시, 입 방정이 문제… 라는 소리 못 들어보셨어요 천아 씨?

1480000017.english: It's okay, it won't come anymore. Just trust me.
1480000017.korean: 괜찮아, 이제 더는 오지 않을 거야. 나만 믿어.

1480000020.english: Welcome, do you have anything to order?
1480000020.korean: 어서 와, 뭐 주문할 거 있어?

1480000023.english: Oh no... wasn't Sirene supposed to be taking orders?
1480000023.korean: 이런… 세이렌 씨가 주문을 받는 게 아니었나?

1480000025.english: I get it. I'll have the Horizon Special Sweet Caramel Macchiato, and…
1480000025.korean: 알겠다. 나는 호라이즌 특제 스위트 카라멜 마끼아또, 그리고…

1480000026.english: As expected of you, Senior. As expected of you, you're so friendly...!

1480000028.english: Is something wrong? Why do you look so serious?
1480000028.korean: 혹시 뭐 잘못 된 거 있어? 표정이 왜 심각해?

1480000029.english: Phew... I'm nervous because this is the first time I've spoken to CheonA...
1480000029.korean: 후우… 천아씨와 말을 섞는 건 처음이라 긴장된다...

1480000030.english: So… um… a macchiato… with… whipped cream as a topping, and… for dessert… ugh… with maple syrup…
1480000030.korean: 그러니까… 으음… 마끼아또에… 토핑은… 휘핑, 그리고… 디저트로는… 으으… 메이플 시럽에…

1480000031.english: Senior, didn't you take notes before coming here?
1480000031.korean: 선배. 여기 오기 전에 메모한 거 있지 않았나?

1480000032.english: So, two sweet caramel macchiatos and a waffle with maple syrup and fruit toppings, right?
1480000032.korean: 그러니까, 스위트 카라멜 마끼아또 두 잔에 메이플 시럽과 과일 토핑을 넣은 와플 맞지?

1480000034.english: This is a big problem... I never imagined Ms. CheonA would take our order.
1480000034.korean: 큰일이다... 천아 씨가 우리 주문을 받을 거라곤 상상도 못했다.

1480000035.english: Hey... did I do something wrong...? Why are you two whispering to each other?
1480000035.korean: 저기... 내가 뭐 잘못한 거라도 있어…? 왜 둘이서만 소곤거려?

1480000037.english: … Excuse me. I'm a bit busy right now. Could you hurry with the order?
1480000037.korean: …저기. 지금 좀 바쁜데. 주문 좀 서두를 수 있을까?

1480000038.english: I'm sorry... give us a little more time...

1480000040.english: Cafe Horizon was bustling for the first time in a while with soldiers looking to rest after finishing their training.
1480000040.korean: - 훈련이 끝나 쉬려는 대원들로 카페 호라이즌은 간만에 북적거렸다.

1480000041.english: Not only were the Horizon members running around in a panic, but CheonA, who was in charge of the branch, was also running around frantically, busy serving customers.
1480000041.korean: - 허겁지겁 뛰어다니는 호라이즌 멤버들은 물론, 분점을 맡은 천아도 이리저리 뛰어다니며 서빙에 여념 없었다.

1480000042.english: Oh my, a guest has arrived?

1480000043.english: Haa~ Don't even get me started, you hot pack. Can you at least massage my calves? Hmm... No. My thighs too... Ah, seriously~ I'm too tired, I guess I can't do this.
1480000043.korean: 하아~ 말도 마 핫팩. 종아리라도 좀 주물러 줄래? &n으음… 아니다. 허벅지도… 아 진짜~ 너무 힘들어서 안 되겠네?

1480000044.english: CheonA slyly lifted the bottom of her apron. Just as I was about to snicker and say something, CheonA spoke to me.
1480000044.korean: - 천아는 슬쩍, 자신의 앞치마 아래를 들어올렸다. &n피식거리며 무어라 말하려는 순간, 천아가 내게 입을 열었다.

1480000045.english: If a hot pack or massage isn't possible… let's go get some fresh air together after work to relieve all my stress…
1480000045.korean: 핫팩, 안마가 안 되면… 내 스트레스 잔뜩 풀어줄 겸, 알바 끝나고 같이 바람 쐐러…

1480000047.english: A Sirene hurriedly ran up to CheonA and greeted her.
1480000047.korean: - 천아의 앞에 세이렌이 바쁘게 뛰어 와 인사했다.

1480000048.english: Huh? Commander, you're here? Since you came despite being busy, of course you came to comfort us, right?
1480000048.korean: 헤에? 사령관님 오셨어요? 바쁜 와중에도 오셨다는 건 당연히~ 저희를 위로해주시려고 오신 거죠?

1480000049.english: Thetis brought the menu, quickly seated me, and thrust it right in front of my eyes.
1480000049.korean: - 메뉴판을 가져 온 테티스는 재빨리 나를 자리에 앉히곤 메뉴판을 눈앞으로 들이밀었다.

1480000050.english: Hahaha! You're not thinking of backing out because you're scared of the secret menu, are you? I didn't think you were like that~
1480000050.korean: 아하하하! 설마 시크릿 메뉴가 무서워서 발 빼실 생각이세요? 그렇게 안 봤는데~

1480000052.english: I just came out for a moment... because I heard my lord had arrived...
1480000052.korean: 잠깐 나와 본 것이오… 주군이 왔다기에…

1480000053.english: Unlike his usual self, whenever I see him blushing in a cafe uniform, my heart flutters for no reason.
1480000053.korean: - 평소의 용과 달리, 카페 유니폼을 입고 얼굴을 붉히는 모습을 볼 때마다 괜스레 마음이 설렌다.

1480000054.english: Hehe, Commander... Look right here, exclusively for you! A special menu! The Vice-Captain and the Admiral have been honing their skills and practicing for this too!
1480000054.korean: 헤헹, 사령관님… 여기 보시면 사령관님 전용! 스페셜 메뉴! 부함장님이랑 대장님도 이걸 위해 칼을 갈며 연습했다고요!

1480000055.english: … I didn't practice that hard, though.

1480000056.english: Ms. Thetis, wasn't that menu only sold at night?
1480000056.korean: 테티스 씨, 그 메뉴는 밤에만 파는 거 아니었어요?

1480000057.english: You can sell it during the day too. Over there, somewhere people can't see...
1480000057.korean: 낮에도 팔 수 있지. 저기, 사람들 안 보이는 쪽으로…

1480000058.english: Don't tease the Commander too much!

1480000059.english: Judging by how the Horizon crew members are acting even more affectionately than usual... it seems their intention is to get lots of praise for the first time in a while.
1480000059.korean: - 평소보다 더욱 애교를 부리는 호라이즌 대원들의 마음을 보아하니... &n오랜만에 잔뜩 칭찬해달라는 의도인 것 같다.

1480000060.english: Hey, wait a hand warmer. I mean...

1480000061.english: Ah, Commander. The Captain has been muttering to himself while making coffee for the past few days... Do you have any idea what it is?
1480000061.korean: 아, 사령관님. 대장님께서 며칠 전부터 커피 만들면서 혼자 뭐라 중얼거리시는데… 짐작가는 게 있으세요?

1480000063.english: Stop talking nonsense and take the order quickly, Thetis...
1480000063.korean: 쓸데 없는 말 하지 마시고 빨리 주문 받으세요 테티스씨…

1480000064.english: Come to think of it, didn't the Vice-Captain go around asking Audrey about her due date while wearing a new dress? Puhahaha~ You're planning to wear it on your date with the Commander, aren't you?
1480000064.korean: 그러고보니 부함장님도 오드리한테 신상 원피스 입고 예정일을 묻고 다니지 않았어요? &n푸하하하~ 사령관님 데이트 때 걸치시려는 거죠?

1480000065.english: Then, do you think I wouldn't know that Thetis also asked the Orca Network what kind of winning underwear would be good?!
1480000065.korean: 그, 그러면 테티스 씨도 승부 속옷은 뭐가 좋을까 오르카 네트워크에 질문하신 거 제가 모를 줄 알아요?!

1480000066.english: Ugh! How on earth did you know that?!

1480000067.english: Everyone, stop that... and for now, please focus on making a drink to quench the Lord's thirst.
1480000067.korean: 다들 그만하고… 일단 주군의 갈증을 풀 음료를 만드는데 집중해주시오.

1480000068.english: What's up with everyone gathered here without even serving... Ah, Commander?!
1480000068.korean: 뭔데 다들 서빙도 안 하고 모여있… 앗, 사령관?!

1480000069.english: Phew... Commander, you know the kitchen is a total battlefield right now, right...? I'm tired...
1480000069.korean: 후아… 사령관, 지금 주방 상태가 완전 전쟁터 인 거 알지…? 피곤해…

1480000070.english: Phew, Neri is having a hard time too...

1480000071.english: Commander… after Neri finishes work today, can’t you go on a date with her for the first time in a while?
1480000071.korean: 사령관… 오늘 네리 일 끝나고, 간만에 네리랑 데이트 해주면 안 돼?

1480000072.english: Neri… I’m the one whose hands are practically swollen from sitting in the kitchen right now! If anyone’s going to do it, I should be the one to go first!
1480000072.korean: 네리… 나야말로 지금 주방에서 손 퉁퉁 불 지경이거든? 하려면 내가 먼저 해야지!

1480000073.english: Maybe it's because I haven't been to cafes often lately... Seeing everyone welcoming me so enthusiastically makes me feel inexplicably apologetic.
1480000073.korean: - 요즘 카페에 자주 들린 적이 없어서 그런가… &n다들 격하게 날 맞이하는 모습을 보니 괜스레 미안해진다.

1480000076.english: No. It's fine. There are already plenty of other people trying to make plans besides me.
1480000076.korean: 아냐. 됐어, 나 말고도 이미 선약 잡으려는 사람들 많은데.

1480000077.english: Ah, whatever~ I just need to get back to work. Just pretend you didn't hear what I just said.
1480000077.korean: 아 몰라~ 일이나 해야지, 방금 말은 그냥 못 들은 걸로 해줘.

1480000078.english: CheonA shrugged her shoulders, picked up the tray, and turned around. The sight of CheonA looking slightly different from usual lingered in my mind.
1480000078.korean: - 천아는 어깨를 으쓱하곤 쟁반을 들며 뒤돌아 섰다. &n평소와는 살짝 다른 천아의 모습이 눈에 밟힌다.

1480000080.english: (No! I asked them out first! Why are you only letting the Horizon guys off the hook?!)
1480000080.korean: (아니! 내가 먼저 데이트 신청했잖아! 왜 호라이즌 애들만 봐주는데?!)

1480000081.english: (Honestly, it's not like my looks are inferior...)

1480000082.english: (Is it because I always put Hot Pack in his place and act like a friend...? Could it be that he actually thinks of me as a friend?)
1480000082.korean: (매번 핫팩 기죽이고 친구처럼 굴어서 그런가…? 설마 날 친구처럼 생각하나?)

1480000083.english: (Sigh... Should I try a bit of an image change? Come to think of it... I can kind of say I've been putting up too much of a wall against Hot Pack...)
1480000083.korean: (하아... 이미지 변신 좀 해볼까? 하긴… 너무 핫팩한테 철벽만 친 느낌도 없잖아 있고...)

1480000084.english: You've been lifting and lowering the hem of your dress for a while now... Are you thinking of trying on a dress, CheonA?
1480000084.korean: 아까부터 계속 옷자락만 들었다 놨다 하시는데… 원피스 입어보실 생각이신가요, 천아?

1480000085.english: Huh? Oh, I've been wearing childish clothes all the time... so I wanted a change of pace.
1480000085.korean: 응? 아, 맨날 유치한 옷만 입다보니… 기분 전환 하고 싶어서.

1480000086.english: Well, I'm not sure if this kind of outfit would suit CheonA.
1480000086.korean: 글쎄요? 제가 생각하기엔 천아가 이런 옷이 어울릴 지는 잘 모르겠네요.

1480000087.english: … It’s not a bad idea to try a style like this once in a while instead of always wearing jackets, right?
1480000087.korean: ….맨날 자켓만 입는 것보다 이런 스타일도 한 번 시도해 보는 거, 나쁘진 않잖아?

1480000088.english: In my opinion, CheonA has a perfect figure. The fit is beautiful no matter what she wears… Hmm… Without anything standing out too much like Janghwa or Fafnir…
1480000088.korean: 제가 생각할 때, 천아의 몸매는 퍼펙트해요. &n어떤 옷을 입더라도 핏이 아름답거든요… 흐음... 장화나 파프니르처럼 크게 튀는 곳 없이…

1480000089.english: … What do you mean by that?

1480000090.english: The important thing is that, rather than trying to dress up... there are definitely styles where showing your natural beauty just as it is suits you better.
1480000090.korean: 중요한 건, 꾸미려고 노력하기보다...&n분명 자신이 가진 아름다움을 있는 그대로 보여주는 것이 더 어울리는 스타일이 있다는 거예요.

1480000091.english: Without any embellishments? I don't quite understand.
1480000091.korean: 꾸밈 없이? 잘 이해가 안 가는데?

1480000093.english: … So, you're basically saying that wearing clothes like this isn't very good, right?
1480000093.korean: …결국 이런 옷을 입는 건 별로다, 뭐 이런 말이 하고 싶은 거지?

1480000094.english: Yes. I think CheonA's charm has a slightly different vibe from this outfit.
1480000094.korean: 네. 제가 생각하는 천아의 매력은 이 옷과는 결이 조금 달라보여서요.

1480000096.english: Hey, aren't you on recycling duty today?
1480000096.korean: 야, 너 오늘 분리수거 당번 아니냐?

1480000097.english: Is that so... I'm tired, so could you empty it for me just this once? I'm a bit tired today...
1480000097.korean: 그랬나… 언니 피곤하니까 이번만 네가 대신 비워주면 안 될까? 오늘 좀 피곤해서…

1480000098.english: I worked my ass all day today, too, you know? Do you think you're the only one who came from working?
1480000098.korean: 나도 오늘 하루종일 존나 고생했거든? 너만 일하다 온 줄 아냐?

1480000099.english: Ah, okay, Red. I'll just leave it behind!
1480000099.korean: 아~ 알았어 빨강이. 버리고 오면 될 거 아냐!

1480000101.english: You're being too loud. If there's nothing else to throw away, go empty it out, okay?
1480000101.korean: 시끄러워. 더 버릴 거 없으면 비우고 온다?

1480000102.english: What's wrong? You're acting like this all of a sudden. Is something seriously wrong?
1480000102.korean: 뭔데 갑자기 그래. 진짜 뭔 일 있냐?

1480000103.english: Is it any of your business?!

1480000104.english: What's wrong? Why is he suddenly acting like that?

1480000105.english: CheonA? It looks like the main branch is really busy today.
1480000105.korean: 천아? 본점이 오늘 많이 바쁜 모양이네?

1480000106.english: If it's busy, should I come when it's quiet?

1480000107.english: Is it okay to empty the kitchen right now?

1480000110.english: Neri is having a hard time too...

1480000111.english: CheonA, do you have something to say?

1480000112.english: Didn't you say something like, "Going out for some fresh air" earlier?
1480000112.korean: 아까, 바람 쐬러… 뭐 이런 말 하지 않았어?

1490000001.english: Hey, I threw everything away. Stop nagging... I'm going to go wash up first, okay?
1490000001.korean: 야, 다 버리고 왔어. 잔소리 그만하고... 나 먼저 씻으러 간다?

1490000002.english: What the hell are you messing up? It's like seeing your old self... So annoying.
1490000002.korean: 뭔데 지랄이야? 옛날 모습 보는 거 같네... 개 띠껍게.

1490000003.english: Shut up, I'm just in a shitty mood.
1490000003.korean: 입 다물어, 그냥 기분 엿같아서 그런 거니까.

1490000004.english: Stop acting tough and tell me, you idiot. Did something really happen?
1490000004.korean: 가오만 잡지 말고 얘기 해 봐 멍청아. 뭔 일 있었냐 진짜로?

1490000006.english: Hey. I'm not going back on my word. Just tell me what happened.
1490000006.korean: 야. 이제 두 말 안 한다? 뭔일인지나 말해.

1490000007.english: Oh, never mind. Since when have you ever listened to me?
1490000007.korean: 아 됐어. 네가 언제부터 내 얘기 들어줬다고.

1490000008.english: This bitch is being a pain in the ass even when I'm trying to care. I'm seriously not going to ask about it.
1490000008.korean: 이 기집애가 신경 써줘도 지랄이네. 진짜 안 묻고 넘어간다?

1490000010.english: Hey, I've gone this far, and you really have nothing to say?
1490000010.korean: 야, 이렇게까지 하는데 정말 할 말이 없어?

1490000012.english: What kind of kid do I look like to you?
1490000012.korean: 네가 보기엔 내가 어떤 애로 보이냐?

1490000013.english: What kind of kid do I look like? Just you, the crazy one.
1490000013.korean: 어떤 애로 보이긴? 그냥 지랄병난 너지.

1490000014.english: No, I mean... right now... *sigh*, I mean... I'm asking how you think Hot Pack will see me.
1490000014.korean: 아니, 그니까… 지금… 하아, 그니까… 핫팩이 날 어떻게 볼 것 같냐고.

1490000015.english: To be more precise… that little rascal is a gentle pet dog that does everything you say, and Babonir is… an idiot.
1490000015.korean: 더 자세히 말하면… 똥강아지 걔는 지 말이면 다 들어주는 순둥한 애완견이고, 바보니르는… 모지리고.

1490000016.english: And you're a psychopath and a lunatic.

1490000017.english: What are you trying to say that you're beating around the bush like this?
1490000017.korean: 하고 싶은 말이 뭔데 이렇게 빙빙 돌려?

1490000019.english: It's because I don't remember ever spending proper time alone with Hot Pack, not even once.
1490000019.korean: 단 한 번도 핫팩이랑 제대로 단둘이 시간을 보내본 기억이 없어서 그래.

1490000020.english: It probably plays a part that I just readily joined without any major incidents like you guys... but I said I live like a snake god... do you really see me as a block of wood?
1490000020.korean: 너희들처럼 큰 사건 없이 넙죽 합류한 것도 한몫하겠지만… 내가 뱀신처럼 산다고 했더니… 진짜 목석으로 보는 건가?

1490000021.english: What's wrong with you all of a sudden? Just do what you usually do. If you do something you're not used to, he'll be the only one who thinks you're weird.
1490000021.korean: 갑자기 왜 그래? 너 하던대로 해. 안 하던 거 하다가 걔만 너 이상하게 생각할 걸.

1490000022.english: Damn it, do I have to act cute like the other kids now?
1490000022.korean: 아니 씨, 이제 와서 내가 다른 애들처럼 애교라도 부려?

1490000023.english: What are you talking about? Just ask someone out on a date the way you want. Why are you making it so complicated?
1490000023.korean: 뭐래. 그냥 네 식대로 데이트 신청하면 될 거 아냐. 뭔 생각을 어렵게 해?

1490000024.english: No, that's not it! I mean... since I'm doing things my own way, the hot pack doesn't even notice!
1490000024.korean: 아니 그게 아니라! 그니까… 내가 내 식대로 나가니까 핫팩은 핫팩대로 눈치를 못 채잖아!

1490000025.english: You idiot... You're not seriously planning to come here now and act all coy and lisp like them, are you?
1490000025.korean: 븅신아... 설마 지금 와서 걔네들처럼 교태 떨면서 혀 짧은 소리라도 낼 작정이야?

1490000027.english: Just keep going as usual. Why are you sitting here talking nonsense now?
1490000027.korean: 그냥 평소대로 밀고 나가라고. 이제 와서 무슨 쓸데없는 소릴 하고 앉아있어.

1490000028.english: Hey, Red. You're talking carelessly just because it's none of your business, aren't you?
1490000028.korean: 야, 빨강이. 너 지금 남의 일이라고 함부로 말하는 거지?

1490000029.english: I'm saying this because you're sitting there acting all weak, which is unlike you. Honestly, do you think he'll go all lovey-dovey if you wear clothes that don't suit you and act all cutesy?
1490000029.korean: 너 답지 않게 약한 소리나 하고 앉았으니 이렇게 말하지.&n막말로 네가 안 어울리는 옷 입고 애교 떨면 걔가 헬렐레 할 거 같냐?

1490000031.english: He would be terrified and ask if he did something wrong.
1490000031.korean: 자기가 뭐 잘못한 거 있냐고 기겁하겠다.

1490000032.english: Judging by what you say, you sound like a dating expert.

1490000033.english: Even when I speak seriously, they make a fuss. Just do whatever you want.
1490000033.korean: 진지하게 얘기해도 난리야. 네 마음대로 해 그냥.

1490000034.english: But you used to wag your tail and call me master...
1490000034.korean: 근데 너 주인님 하면서 꼬리 흔들고 그랬…

1490000035.english: Shut up! If you keep doing that, I won't say anything, okay?
1490000035.korean: 시끄러워! 자꾸 그러면 아무 말도 안 할 거다?

1490000036.english: Got it, you bitch... So, what you're trying to say is... show the Commander my true self and approach him?
1490000036.korean: 알았어 이년아… 그래서, 네가 하고 싶은 말은… &n사령관한테 솔직하게 내 모습을 보여주고 다가가라 이거야?

1490000038.english: But... Hot Pack will probably just think of me as a friend and move on...
1490000038.korean: 그렇지만… 핫팩은 그냥 날 친구로만 생각하고 넘어갈…

1490000039.english: Why did you suddenly become such a coward? Hey, be honest... You're not CheonA, are you?
1490000039.korean: 왜 갑자기 쫄보가 됐어? 야, 솔직히 말해... 너 천아 아니지?

1490000040.english: What's up? You two are sitting there having such a serious conversation. Are you two dating?
1490000040.korean: 뭐야. 둘이 그렇게 앉아서 진지하게 이야기를 다 하고 있네, 둘이 사귀냐?

1490000041.english: Oh right. I'm talking about you, Babonir. Didn't you barge into his room and pounce on him out of the blue back then?
1490000041.korean: 아 맞다. 바보니르 너 말이야. 그때 걔 방에 처들어가서 다짜고짜 덮치지 않았냐?

1490000042.english: Hehe! That's right! It was just the alcohol, though... But why?
1490000042.korean: 후훗! 그랬었지! 술기운이긴 했지만… 근데 그건 왜?

1490000043.english: This girl wants to date him seriously, but she doesn't know how to approach him, so she was asking.
1490000043.korean: 이 기집애가 걔랑 진지하게 데이트 하려는데 뭘 어떻게 접근해야 할지 몰라서 묻고 있더라고.

1490000044.english: Him? Hahaha! Is that why he looks so serious? I can't imagine.
1490000044.korean: 쟤가? 푸하하하! 그런 이유로 심각한 표정이야? 상상이 안 가는데?

1490000045.english: Yeah, laugh as much as you can, Battery.

1490000046.english: Ahahahaha! Oh, that's funny! Should I go tell him tomorrow? The great CheonA groaning over something as trivial as that…
1490000046.korean: 아하하하하! 아 웃겨! 내가 내일 걔한테 가서 말해줄까? 천하의 천아가 겨우 그런 일로 끙끙…

1490000047.english: Hey, Babonir. I think you'd better stop here and wrap it up.
1490000047.korean: 야, 바보니르. 적당히 하다 끝내는 게 좋을 거 같은데.

1490000048.english: I mean, it's just funny. They acted all high and mighty, and now they're coming up with this...
1490000048.korean: 아니 웃겨서 그렇지, 온갖 가오는 다 잡고 이제 와서…

1490000050.english: Hey, Babonir. Can't you hear something snapping somewhere?
1490000050.korean: 야 바보니르. 어디서 뭐 끊어지는 소리 안 들리냐?

1490000051.english: Huh? What's snapping? I mean, anyway~ He's been spouting weird nonsense on every mission for ages...
1490000051.korean: 응? 뭐가 끊어지는데? 아니 하여튼~ 옛날부터 임무 때마다 무슨 이상한 헛소리만 하더니…

1490000052.english: The sound of this girl's patience snapping.

1490000054.english: Hey Battery. Where's your power outlet? Next time, I'll stick a knife in your ass instead of your pillow.
1490000054.korean: 야 베터리. 너 콘센트 어디냐? 다음엔 나이프를 네 베개가 아니라 엉덩이에 꽂아줄게.

1490000056.english: You idiot, you're asking for a beating.

1490000057.english: No... He caused such a fuss himself, and now he's complaining...

1490000058.english: Do you want me to bring back old memories?

1490000059.english: Seriously, did I say anything wrong?! Can't you even speak properly?!
1490000059.korean: 아니 내가 틀린 말 했냐고 진짜! 말 하나도 제대로 못해?!

1490000060.english: Battery, shall we set the pecking order again for once? You think you can treat me like an equal now that I've coddled you?
1490000060.korean: 배터리, 오랜만에 서열 정리 좀 다시 해줄까? 오냐 오냐 해주니까 맞먹네?

1490000061.english: Hey, put the knife down and talk! Don't throw it! Hey, hey!
1490000061.korean: 야, 나이프 내려놓고 말해! 던지지 마? 야, 야!

1490000063.english: Damn, why the hell are you throwing a knife around in the accommodation... Uh, wait. Hey... isn't that book stuck in the knife right now the limited edition photobook that little brat bought for a fortune?
1490000063.korean: 씨, 왜 숙소에서 칼을 던지고 지랄… 어 잠깐. 야...&n지금 나이프에 박힌 책, 똥강아지가 비싼 돈 주고 산 한정판 화보집 아니냐?

1490000066.english: Hmm. Why is the accommodation such a mess? It's practically a pigsty…
1490000066.korean: 흐음. 뭔데 숙소가 엉망이지? 돼지 우리가 따로 없…

1490000068.english: Let me ask just one thing.

1490000069.english: Quickly explain within 30 characters why a sword was embedded in the castle of our noble master.
1490000069.korean: 고귀하신 주인님 성안에 어떤 연유로 칼이 박혔는지 30자 내로 요약해 속히 변명해라.

1490000070.english: Before I cut off the necks of all three of you right now.
1490000070.korean: 너희 셋의 목을 당장 베어버리기 전에.

1500000001.english: As expected, Neri is... embarrassed to go out in clothes like this...
1500000001.korean: 네리는 역시… 이런 옷으로 밖에 다니기 부끄러워…

1500000002.english: That masked kid who's the therapist or whatever barely wears any clothes... but still, isn't this pretty wholesome, Neri?
1500000002.korean: 그 테라피 치료사인가 뭔가 하는 마스크 쓴 애는 거의 옷을 안 입고 다니는데… 그래도 이 정도면 건전한 거 아냐, 네리?

1500000003.english: Is that so? But... ever since what happened with the Commander... I feel embarrassed every time I wear clothes like this.
1500000003.korean: 그런가? 하지만… 사령관이랑 있던 일 이후론… 이런 옷 입을 때마다 부끄럽단 말이야.

1500000004.english: You were wearing it just fine when you were inside the cafe, so why the sudden change? Seriously.
1500000004.korean: 카페 안에 있을 땐 잘만 입고 다녔으면서, 갑자기 왜 그래? 참나.

1500000007.english: Huh? It's nothing. I just have something to think about.
1500000007.korean: 응? 별거 아냐. 그냥 생각 할 게 좀 있어서.

1500000008.english: What's wrong? Your expression has been gloomy since yesterday, and you keep spacing out and making mistakes with your order.
1500000008.korean: 뭐야? 어제부터 표정 어두워지더니 자꾸 멍 때리고, 주문 실수하고.

1500000010.english: Hey, what are you going to do if you stare at me like that?!
1500000010.korean: 그, 그렇게 쳐다보면 뭐 어쩔 건데?!

1500000011.english: Hey, do you guys know the makeup trend among the Orca kids these days?
1500000011.korean: 야, 너네들 요새… 오르카 애들 사이에서 유행하는 메이크업 알아?

1500000012.english: Makeup? Undine would know that well.
1500000012.korean: 메이크업? 그건 운디네가 잘 알긴 할텐데.

1500000014.english: I tried doing my makeup a few days ago... but I got teased for drawing on my face...
1500000014.korean: 며칠 전에 메이크업 해봤는데… 얼굴에 그림 그렸냐고 놀림 받아서…

1500000015.english: Hahaha! The commander would have been terrified if he saw that!

1500000016.english: Don't tease me... I worked really hard preparing for this date since it's been a while.
1500000016.korean: 놀리지 마... 나 오랜만에 하는 데이트라서 열심히 준비 했단 말이야.

1500000017.english: But in the end, didn't you go on a date without makeup, Neri?
1500000017.korean: 근데 결국 맨얼굴로 데이트 하러가지 않았어 네리?

1500000019.english: I'm telling you, doing something you're not used to just feels awkward. Just do what you've always done, Neri.
1500000019.korean: 쓸데없이 안 하던 거 하면 어색하기만 하다니까? 네리도 항상 그랬듯, 했던 대로 하라고.

1500000020.english: Hehe… I guess that’s right, Thetis?

1500000021.english: But there's nothing wrong with looking good, is there? Neri probably did that because she wanted to look better too.
1500000021.korean: 근데 잘 보여서 나쁜 건 없잖아? 네리도 더 잘 보이고 싶은 마음이 있으니까 그랬겠지.

1500000022.english: … Neri, it was the first time I’d tried this makeup.

1500000023.english: Why did you tease the kid who was wearing makeup for the first time like that? She must have been traumatized.
1500000023.korean: 왜 처음 화장하는 애를 그렇게 놀렸어? 트라우마 생겼겠다.

1500000024.english: Seriously, Neri actually looks prettier without makeup! I went to all the trouble to stop her, and seriously...
1500000024.korean: 참나, 원래 네리는 화장 안 한 게 더 예뻐! 기껏 뜯어 말려줬더니 진짜…

1500000025.english: Like Thetis looking for a bra one size larger?
1500000025.korean: 테티스가 한 치수 큰 브래지어 찾는 것처럼?

1500000026.english: Why do you have to give examples like that?!
1500000026.korean: 왜 예시를 들어도 그렇게 드는 건데?!

1500000027.english: Ha, you guys talk like you've tried everything with hot packs and all sorts of other things?
1500000027.korean: 하, 무슨 너희들 핫팩이랑 뭐… 이것저것 다해본 것처럼 말한다?

1500000028.english: Pfft. We'd already tried everything before you even joined.
1500000028.korean: 풉. 너 합류하기 전에도 이미 해볼 거 다 해봤는데?

1500000031.english: What, CheonA? Have you never once had a proper, serious time hanging out with the Commander, just the two of you?
1500000031.korean: 뭐야, 천아 넌 한 번도 제대로 사령관이랑 진지하게 둘이서 놀아본 적 없어?

1500000032.english: Ha... Hot Pack is always busy, so I couldn't help it.
1500000032.korean: 하… 핫팩이 맨날 바쁘니까 나도 어쩔 수 없던 거지.

1500000033.english: Come to think of it, about the JangHwa a few days ago... I saw them going to the movies with the Commander. You can't just work all year round, you know...
1500000033.korean: 그러고보니 며칠 전에 장화 말이야…사령관이랑 영화 보러 가던 거 봤었는데. &n사람이 일년 내내 일만하면서 살 순 없잖…

1500000034.english: The commander really lives doing nothing but work.

1500000036.english: I guess I need to make some changes, right?

1500000037.english: Hmm... but I don't really have a desire for clothes... Hot Pack does like this, though... but I can't just blindly go on a date like this.
1500000037.korean: 으음… 근데 내가 옷 욕심이 없어서… 핫팩이 이걸 좋아하긴 하는데... 이상태로 무턱대고 덜렁 데이트에 나갈 순 없잖아.

1500000038.english: … You actually thought about going on a date wearing that uniform?
1500000038.korean: …그 유니폼을 입고 데이트에 나갈 생각을 했다고?

1500000040.english: Ah, I don't know. Ah, I don't know, I don't know!

1500000041.english: But CheonA, normally only Neri is supposed to do the external promotion, so why are you coming out and doing it together?
1500000041.korean: 근데 천아, 원래 외부 홍보는 네리만 하는 건데 왜 천아도 같이 나와서 하고 있어?

1500000042.english: … My little rascal scratched the limited edition photobook, so I have to buy him a new one. I need a can of tuna urgently.
1500000042.korean: …똥강아지 한정판 화보집에 기스 내서 새로 사줘야 해. 참치캔 급하다고.

1500000043.english: It's sold out, so I think it'll be really hard to get.
1500000043.korean: 그거 품절이라서 진짜 구하기 어려울 거 같은데?

1500000044.english: They're doing this because they have to compensate us somehow.
1500000044.korean: 어떻게든 보상은 해줘야 하니까, 이러는 거지.

1500000045.english: Huh? Isn't that the Commander? Commander! Over here! Over here!
1500000045.korean: 어? 저거 사령관님 아냐? 사령관님! 여기에요 여기!

1500000046.english: I came out for some fresh air and ran into the members working part-time at Cafe Horizon.
1500000046.korean: - 잠시 바람을 쐬러 나온 난 카페 호라이즌 아르바이트를 하는 대원들과 마주쳤다.

1500000047.english: I have some circumstances... so I'm working overtime and helping out the guys at the main branch.
1500000047.korean: 사정이 있어서... 추가근무 겸 본점 애들 일 도와주는 중이야.

1500000048.english: Hehe, where are you going, Commander? It's break time right now, will you be able to hear me?
1500000048.korean: 헤헤, 어디가세요 사령관? 지금 브레이크 타임인데 들리시겠어요?

1500000049.english: I lightly flicked Thetis's forehead as she grinned and pointed at the menu.
1500000049.korean: - 헤실거리며 내게 메뉴판을 가리키는 테티스의 이마에 딱밤을 살짝 박았다.

1500000050.english: Whining! Why, why are you hitting me!

1500000051.english: Then, Commander. Let's hang out after the cafe closes, okay?
1500000051.korean: 그럼 사령관. 카페 끝나고 우리랑 놀자, 응?

1500000052.english: I shrugged at the look in Neri and Thetis's eyes, which were filled with anticipation.
1500000052.korean: - 무언가 기대하는 눈빛으로 가득 찬 네리와 테티스의 눈망울에 나는 어깨를 으쓱했다.

1500000053.english: Hahaha! We're leaving when work is done, right? Then what should we do, Commander? Huh? Huh?
1500000053.korean: 꺄하핫! 일 다 끝나면 가는 거죠? 그럼 우리 뭐할까요 사령관? 응? 응?

1500000054.english: Neri is fine with VR games too!

1500000056.english: Me, um... I'm fine going anywhere. But you know, a hot pack.
1500000056.korean: 나, 으음… 아무데나 가도 괜찮아. 근데 있잖아 핫팩.

1500000057.english: I heard you went to the movie theater with JangHwa? Doesn't she not really like that kind of thing?
1500000057.korean: 장화랑 영화관 같이 갔다 왔다면서? 걔 그런 거 별로 안 좋아하지 않아?

1500000058.english: - If it were the old Janghwa, he would obviously growl at me, asking why I'm going to see something like that with him...
1500000058.korean: - 예전의 장화라면 그런 걸 왜 나랑 보러 가냐면서 으르렁 될 게 뻔하지만...

1500000059.english: Janghwa held my hand tightly and focused on the movie until the very end. She even whined, asking me to repeat the lines the male lead had said.
1500000059.korean: - 장화는 내 손을 꼭 잡은 채, 영화에 끝까지 집중했다. &n남자 주인공이 했던 대사를 따라해 달라며 칭얼거리기까지 했고.

1500000060.english: … Rain JangHwa? Are you saying that's a bit strange from your perspective?

1500000061.english: Janghwa was once called the embodiment of vengeance, despising Hongryeon and the Mongoose Team and vowing to wipe them all out. Who wouldn't be glad to see Janghwa gradually overcoming her past trauma?
1500000061.korean: - 장화는 한때 홍련과 몽구스팀을 혐오하며 다 없애겠다던 복수의 화신으로 불리었다.&n그런 장화가 점차 과거의 트라우마를 극복해 나가는데 누가 좋지 않겠는가?

1500000062.english: Looks like the hot pack should be changed...?

1500000063.english: … Rather than acting like a friend or cursing, I guess it’s better to be a little affectionate, right?
1500000063.korean: …친구 같거나, 욕하는 모습보단, 역시 조금 살가운 게 좋은 거겠지?

1500000064.english: Like Thetis or Neri…? Or like the JangHwa…?

1500000065.english: Of course, they say that if the person changes, it's good for the listener and everything improves... but CheonA changing seems like a completely different matter.
1500000065.korean: - 물론 사람이 바뀌면 듣는 사람도 좋고 다 좋아진다지만… 천아가 바뀌는 건 결이 다른 문제 같다.

1500000066.english: From the moment we first met, he suddenly hugged me and asked for a 'hot pack'... and then he stole my sense of recognition.
1500000066.korean: - 처음 만났을 때부터 대뜸, 안겨오며 '핫팩'을 해달라고 하지 않나... 인식증을 도둑질 하지 않나.

1500000067.english: I have never thought CheonA's sly behavior was bad, but if her attitude were to change to become affectionate... I can't quite imagine it.
1500000067.korean: - 천아의 능청스러운 행동이 나쁘다고 생각해 본 적 없지만, 천아의 태도가 살갑게 바뀐다면… 잘 상상이 되지 않는다.

1500000068.english: A personality that doesn't follow formalities and approaches people without hesitation. Isn't that CheonA's charm?
1500000068.korean: -격식 안 따지고 스스럼없이 다가오는 성격. 그게 천아의 매력 아닐까?

1500000069.english: What… you’re not even answering the question?

1500000070.english: What?! Is it wrong for me to say that?!
1500000070.korean: 아니! 내가 그런 말 하면 뭐 안 되는 거야?!

1500000071.english: CheonA looked at Thetis and Neri, who were clinging to my arms, with a sour expression. It was just then that I felt a sense of unease due to the strangely different feeling from usual.
1500000071.korean: - 천아는 떨떠름한 눈빛으로 내 양팔에 매달린 테티스와 네리를 보았다. &n평소와 묘하게 다른 느낌에 위화감을 느끼던 그때였다.

1500000073.english: Cheona actually wanted to go to karaoke... ♥

1500000077.english: Neri doesn't make that kind of nasal sound...
1500000077.korean: 네리는 저렇게 콧소리 안 낸단 말이야…

1500000079.english: CheonA ran off in a hurry without looking back and disappeared from my sight.
1500000079.korean: - 천아는 뒤도 돌아보지 않고 황급히 뛰어가며 내 시야에서 사라졌다.

1500000082.english: Okay, then shall we stop by later?

1500000083.english: An arcade is fine, too. How about CheonA?

1500000084.english: It's been quiet for a while.

1500000086.english: It seems like the JangHwa have changed a lot after getting used to them.
1500000086.korean: 장화가 적응하더니 많이 바뀌는 거 같더라.

1500000087.english: Yeah. Now it feels like I’m completely my actual age.
1500000087.korean: 응. 이젠 완전히 본래 나이 때 같기도 하고.

1500000088.english: Wouldn't it be better if things changed for the better?
1500000088.korean: 좋게 바뀌는 게 좋은 거 아니겠어?

1500000089.english: CheonA, I never thought those words would come out of your mouth...
1500000089.korean: 그런 말이 천아 네 입에서 나올 줄은 몰랐는데…

1500110001.english: Somewhere in a deep underground facility

1500110002.english: Northern Front Juno Base & Poseidon Temporary Garrison
1500110002.korean: 북부 전선 주노 기지&n포세이돈 임시 주둔지

1500110008.english: Northern Front Juno Base & Poseidon Temporary Garrison
1500110008.korean: 북부 전선 주노 기지&n포세이돈 임시 주둔지

1500110009.english: Northern Front Juno Base & Poseidon Temporary Garrison
1500110009.korean: 북부 전선 주노 기지&n포세이돈 임시 주둔지

1500110011.english: Northern Front Juno Base & Poseidon Temporary Garrison
1500110011.korean: 북부 전선 주노 기지&n포세이돈 임시 주둔지
