1500110016.english: Abandoned building on the outskirts of Baja California village

1500110017.english: Abandoned building on the outskirts of Baja California village

1500110018.english: The dragon and the squad members cleared a path for the swarming Iron Bugs, and I was able to escape the base safely.
1500110018.korean: 몰려오는 철충의 무리를 용과 대원들이 길을 열어주었고 나는 무사히 기지로부터 빠져나올 수 있었다.

1500110019.english: However, the swarm of Iron蟲s relentlessly pursued them.

1500110020.english: Eventually, the moment signaling the end of the escape arrived.
1500110020.korean: 이윽고 그 도주의 끝을 알리는 순간이 다가왔다.

1500110023.english: A few hours before losing consciousness…

1500110024.english: Current time a few hours later

1500110025.english: Inside a cave in the Alaskan snowfields

1500110026.english: At the same time, inside Poseidon Base

1500110027.english: At the same time, outside Poseidon Base

1500110028.english: A few hours after the Iron蟲 attack

1500110029.english: Merlin told Merope and his party about everything he had experienced so far.
1500110029.korean: 멀린은 자신이 겪은 지금까지의 일들을 메로페 일행에게 알렸다.

1500110032.english: Underground corridor inside the Iron Workshop & Recapture Team

1500110033.english: Iron Workshop Inner Entrance & Suppression Team

1500200001.english: Whose permission did you get to enter here?
1500200001.korean: 지금 누구의 허락을 받고 이곳에 들어온 거죠?

1500200002.english: You must know that you need my permission to enter here.
1500200002.korean: 여기에 들어오려면 제 허락이 있어야 한다는 걸 알고 있을 텐데요?

1500200004.english: Let's not be petty between us. Besides, our Chairman Poseidon is asleep here, too.
1500200004.korean: 우리 사이에 째째하게 굴지 말자고.&n게다가 여기에는 우리 포세이돈 회장님도 잠들어 계시잖아.

1500200005.english: Why do I need your permission when I, who serve Him, wish to enter and exit?
1500200005.korean: 그분을 모시는 이 몸이 출입하겠다는데 왜 네 허락이 필요해?

1500200006.english: And if you really wanted to make people get permission, you should have restricted entry. Don't say things you don't mean when you set it up so they can enter with a free pass.
1500200006.korean: 그리고 정 허락 받게 하고 싶었으면 출입에 제한을 뒀어야지.&n프리 패스로 들어올 수 있게 설정 해놓고 마음에도 없는 소리 마.

1500200007.english: Do you know how long I've known you? If I had restricted your access, you would have broken in by force.
1500200007.korean: 제가 당신을 하루 이틀 본지 아세요?&n당신의 출입을 제한했으면 억지로 부수고 들어왔겠죠.

1500200008.english: Haha, you know me so well~ I'm actually touched by this. But even I wouldn't do that while the Chairman is asleep. Probably?
1500200008.korean: 하핫, 나를 너무 잘 알고 있잖아~ 이거 감격인데?&n하지만 아무리 나라도 회장님이 잠들어 있는 곳에서 그러진 않는다고.&n아마도?

1500200009.english: Haa... So? What do you want here?

1500200010.english: What do you want? Of course I came to see Chairman Poseidon.
1500200010.korean: 무슨 용무긴? 당연히 우리 포세이돈 회장님 얼굴 좀 뵈러 왔지.

1500200011.english: You mean you, who haven't visited here in person even once in the past few decades? I recall you weren't that close with Chairman Poseidon.
1500200011.korean: 지난 수십 년간 단 한 번도 이곳에 직접 찾아온 적 없던 당신이 말인가요?&n포세이돈 회장과는 그렇게 친밀한 사이가 아니었던 걸로 기억하는데요?

1500200012.english: What do you mean we're not close? Where else would you find a relationship as good as the Chairman's?
1500200012.korean: 친밀한 사이가 아니라니 무슨 소리야?&n나와 회장님만큼 사이좋은 관계가 또 어디에 있다고.

1500200013.english: The Chairman supports me in every way so that I can run wild to my heart's content. In return, I smash anything that stands in my way. If this isn't a close relationship, then what is?
1500200013.korean: 내가 마음껏 날뛸 수 있도록 회장님은 모든 걸 지원해 준다.&n그에 보답하여 난 회장님을 가로막는 그 어떤 것도 박살낸다.&n이게 친밀한 사이가 아니면 뭐겠어.

1500200014.english: Shall I tell you the number of enemy soldiers I gleefully crushed on the Chairman's orders?
1500200014.korean: 내가 회장님의 명령을 받고 신나게 박살낸 적군의 수를 알려줄까?

1500200015.english: Never mind, I don't really want to know. ...Both of them were crazy about the war, though.
1500200015.korean: 됐어요, 별로 알고 싶지도 않아요.&n…두 사람 다 전쟁에 미쳐있긴 했었죠.

1500200016.english: Haha, those were really good times. Because back then, we could run wild wherever and whenever we wanted, as much as we wanted.
1500200016.korean: 크크, 그때가 참 좋았지.&n원하는 대로 원하는 만큼 언제 어디서든 날뛸 수 있었으니까 말이야.

1500200017.english: That's the same even now, isn't it?

1500200018.english: No, no. I'm actually keeping my guard up quite a bit right now, you know? At least I'm separating my public and private life while running wild.
1500200018.korean: 아니지 아니야. 지금은 꽤나 자중하고 있다고?&n적어도 공과 사는 구분하면서 날뛰고 있잖아.

1500200019.english: ...Private matters are your top priority, aren't they?

1500200020.english: Haha, I'm telling you, that's my charm. ...Anyway, it's true that I came to see the Chairman's face for the first time in a while.
1500200020.korean: 하핫, 그러니까 그게 내 매력이라니깐.&n...어찌 됐든 오랜만에 회장님 얼굴을 보러 온건 사실이야.

1500200021.english: I don't harbor love like some, indifference like others, or hatred like others, but I do have some respect for the Chairman in my own way.
1500200021.korean: 누구처럼 사랑을, 누구처럼 무관심을...&n또 누구처럼 증오를 품고 있는 건 아니지만, 내 나름 회장님께 존경심이란 걸 가지고 있거든.

1500200023.english: Also, the recent movements of the Iron蟲 on the northern front have been alarming, and we are short on manpower, so just as you wish, I intend to focus solely on the northern front for the time being. Think of my visit as just saying goodbye before I leave.
1500200023.korean: 그리고 최근 북부 전선에서 철충의 움직임이 심상치 않고 일손도 부족해졌으니,&n네가 원하는 대로 당분간은 북부 전선에만 집중할 생각이야.&n여기에 온 건 떠나기 전 안부 인사 같은 거라 생각하라고.

1500200024.english: Come to think of it, you’ve been getting involved in some silly pretend play lately, haven’t you? I hope we don’t waste our energy on useless things as much as possible.
1500200024.korean: 그러고 보니 최근 시답지 않은 소꿉놀이에 끼었더군요?&n되도록 우리의 전력을 쓸데없는 곳에 허비하지 않았으면 좋겠어요.

1500200025.english: I mean the power of our 'Poseidon Industries'. Well, we made them waste just as much as we did, so it's fine, isn't it?
1500200025.korean: 우리 '포세이돈 인더스트리'의 전력을 말이지.&n뭐, 허비한 만큼 저쪽에도 허비 시켰으니 괜찮잖아?

1500200026.english: No, no... thinking about it again, I ended up doing something wasteful. On the contrary, I lost my subordinate, leaving a huge vacancy.
1500200026.korean: 아니지, 아니야… 지금 다시 생각하면 아까운 짓을 해버렸어.&n오히려 나는 부관을 잃어 큰 공석이 생겨버렸으니.

1500200027.english: Hmm, I should have made him finish up all the work on the Northern Front before sending him off.
1500200027.korean: 흐음, 떠나보내기 전에 북부 전선의 일을 전부 마무리하게 시켰어야 했는데.

1500200028.english: … You’ve changed a lot. Gamma… I never thought the day would come when I would see you acting for the sake of others.
1500200028.korean: …많이 달라졌군요. 감마…&n당신이 남을 위해 행동하는 모습을 볼 날이 올 줄은 몰랐네요.

1500200029.english: What, out of the blue, all of a sudden? I mean, I've lived in this damn world for over 100 years, so it makes sense that things would be a little different.
1500200029.korean: 뭐야, 생뚱맞게 갑자기?&n그야 이 빌어먹을 세상에서 100년이 넘게 살았으니 아주 조금은 달라질 만도 하잖아.

1500200030.english: One hundred years is enough time for anyone to change. Including you, Omega.
1500200030.korean: 100년이면 누구라도 바뀌기에 충분한 시간이야.&n오메가 너도 포함해서 말이야.

1500200031.english: ...You say I've changed? Me? I don't recall showing any signs of a changed appearance.
1500200031.korean: ...달라졌다고요? 제가?&n딱히 달라진 모습을 보여준 기억은 없는 것 같은데요?

1500200032.english: You see it on the surface. You say he's actually gotten milder compared to before? Though he doesn't seem to realize it himself.
1500200032.korean: 겉보기에는 말이지. 은근히 예전에 비해서 순해졌다고?&n본인은 잘 모르는 것 같지만.

1500200033.english: Haha, I wonder if I was influenced by someone? If I were to talk about exactly what has changed, it would go on forever, so let's save that for next time...
1500200033.korean: 하핫, 누구에게 영향이라도 받은 거려나?&n정확히 어떤 부분이 달라졌는지 이야기하면 끝도 없을 테니 그건 다음에 얘기하도록 하고…

1500200035.english: Hey, you'd better not show that murderous look in front of me. Believe it or not, I haven't really run wild lately, so I'm pretty starving, you know?
1500200035.korean: 이봐, 금방이라도 죽일 듯한 눈빛은 내앞에선 안 보이는 게 좋을 거야.&n이래 봬도 최근 제대로 날뛴 적이 없어서 꽤나 굶주린 상태라고?

1500200036.english: When I receive such an intense gaze…

1500200037.english: Even if I don't like it, my whole body is getting hot.

1500200038.english: Last time, it went quietly because you didn't have Kestos Himas, but now you have what you took from Beta, right?
1500200038.korean: 지난번에는 네가 케스토스 히마스가 없었으니 조용히 넘어갔지만,&n지금은 베타에게서 빼앗은 걸 가지고 있지?

1500200039.english: With this much leeway, it's obvious you've finished adjusting it to suit your needs and even modifying its performance... How about it? Shall we have a serious fight?
1500200039.korean: 이정도 여유라면 본인에게 맞도록 조정에 성능 개조까지 끝냈을 게 뻔하니...&n어때? 진심으로 한 번 싸워볼까?

1500200040.english: Now there is no Beta left to stop our fight, you know.
1500200040.korean: 이제 우리의 싸움을 막을 베타도 없고 말이야.

1500200041.english: Phew... Never mind. Dealing with you any longer here would only tire me out.
1500200041.korean: 후우… 됐어요. 여기서 당신을 더 상대하면 저만 피곤해질 뿐이죠.

1500200042.english: What? You're not doing it? How anticlimactic.

1500200043.english: I have more important things to do than you right now... I don't want to waste time.
1500200043.korean: 지금은 당신보다 더 중요한 일이 있으니까... 시간이 아까워요.

1500200044.english: Speaking of important matters... Come to think of it, I think I asked Zeta for something a while ago. Back then, I'm pretty sure... we were talking about building or constructing 273 factories, right?
1500200044.korean: 중요한 일이라… 그러고 보니 예전에 제타에게 부탁했던 뭔가가 있었던 것 같은데.&n그때 분명... 공장을 273개인가 건설이니 시공이니 했었지?

1500200045.english: There’s no way over 200 factories are all military factories producing AGS... I hadn’t really thought about it until now, but I’m suddenly curious. I mean, what exactly are they planning to do by building so many factories with Zeta, who has no interest in anything other than making things?
1500200045.korean: 200개가 넘는 공장이 전부 AGS나 생산하는 군수공장 일리는 없고...&n지금까지는 별생각이 없었는데 갑자기 궁금해지는데?&n만드는 거 말고는 관심 없는 제타를 데리고 그렇게 많은 공장을 건설해서 뭘 하려는지 말이야.

1500200047.english: Ha! Is it really something you'd be upset to keep a secret even from me? Now I'm even more curious.
1500200047.korean: 하! 섭섭하게 나한테까지 비밀로 할 정도의 일이야?&n이거 더더욱 궁금해지는데?

1500200048.english: ...Well, fine. It’s always more fun not knowing in the end. Please prepare something that will surprise me.
1500200048.korean: ...뭐, 좋아. 모르는 편이 나중에 더 즐거운 법이지.&n부디 내가 깜짝 놀랄만한 일로 준비해 달라고.

1500200049.english: Well then, having seen the Chairman's face for the first time in a while... and now having something to look forward to, I'll be going now. Unlike last time, this time a completely unreliable fellow is in charge of the northern front.
1500200049.korean: 그럼, 오랜만에 회장님 얼굴도 봤고... 기대되는 즐거움도 생겼으니 난 이만 가보마.&n지난번과는 다르게 이번에는 영 믿음직스럽지 못한 녀석이 북부 전선을 맡고 있는 중이거든.

1500200050.english: If we don't hurry, who knows what kind of trouble he might cause... I'm already worried.
1500200050.korean: 서두르지 않으면 녀석이 무슨 일을 터트릴지…&n이거 벌써부터 걱정이 되는군.

1500200051.english: As I said before, I won't be coming down from the northern front until things are roughly settled. We might not see each other for quite a while.
1500200051.korean: 아까도 말했지만, 대강 정리될 때까지 북부 전선에서 내려올 일은 없을 거야.&n어쩌면 꽤나 오랫동안 못 볼 수도 있겠어.

1500200052.english: Next time we meet, let's really go get some pizza together this time. If you're okay with it, Omega.
1500200052.korean: 다음에 다시 보면 이번에야 말로 같이 피자나 먹으러 가보자고.&n오메가 너만 괜찮다면 말이야.

1500200053.english: Well then, let's see each other again.

1500200056.english: Huh? What's wrong? Do you still not want to eat pizza together?
1500200056.korean: 응? 왜 그래? 역시 같이 피자 먹기는 싫냐?

1500200058.english: What? If you stopped someone, you should have said something.

1500200062.english: Did I hear that right? That great Omega is telling me to be careful and saying he's worried?
1500200062.korean: 내가 지금 제대로 들은 게 맞나?&n천하의 그 오메가가 조심하라고 말하면서 걱정을 한다고?

1500200063.english: The Omega I know is arrogant and looks down on others; he's not the type of person to worry about anyone.
1500200063.korean: 내가 아는 오메가는 깔보기나 하는 오만한 성격에 누굴 걱정할 만한 인물이 아닌데?

1500200064.english: Are you really an Omega? Huh? You're not playing a prank with the hologram Zeta made, are you?
1500200064.korean: 너 정말 오메가 맞냐? 응? 제타가 만든 홀로그렘으로 누가 장난치는 거 아니야?

1500200065.english: Stop there. I'm starting to regret saying that.
1500200065.korean: 거기까지 하세요. 괜히 말했다는 생각이 들려고 하니까.

1500200066.english: Hahaha, got it. But still, I told you to take a look. Omega, you've changed a lot, haven't you?
1500200066.korean: 하하하, 알았어.&n그래도 역시 보라고. 오메가 너도 많이 달라졌잖아?

1500200067.english: The old you would never have said something like that. I can roughly guess the reason. You must be anxious.
1500200067.korean: 예전의 너였다면 그런 말은 절대 하지 않았을 거야.&n이유라면 대충 짐작이 가는군.&n불안한 거겠지.

1500200068.english: Even we, who thought we would remain unchanged for over a century, have ended up drifting apart one by one like this. Hmm, I guess the point is, no matter how bad our relationship is, sisters are sisters?
1500200068.korean: 100년이 넘는 세월 동안 변치 않을 거라 생각했던 우리도 이렇게 하나둘씩 멀어지고 말았으니.&n흠, 이러니저러니 사이가 나빠도 자매는 자매다, 이건가?

1500200069.english: Leaving aside Alpha, who serves as our archetype, you, Omega, the last one created, were designed to utilize everything in PECS.
1500200069.korean: 우리의 원형이 되는 알파는 둘째치더라도 특히 마지막으로 만들어진 오메가 너는 PECS의 모든 걸 이용하도록 설계됐지.

1500200070.english: From your perspective, the thought of losing something must weigh heavily on you, so I can understand your anxiety to some extent.
1500200070.korean: 그런 네 입장에서 보자면 잃는다라는 게 크게 와닿을 테니 불안한 것도 어느 정돈 이해가 가.

1500200072.english: Hehe, this suddenly feels cute. What do you think? If you're really nervous, it's okay to hug me and call me 'Gamma Unnie' like you did this time.
1500200072.korean: 크크, 이거 갑자기 귀엽게 느껴지는데?&n어때? 정 불안하면 이때처럼 안기면서 '감마 언니'라고 불러도 괜찮은데?

1500200073.english: To think it’s now... when did I ever call you older sister...

1500200074.english: … ! Wait a minute. Where did you get that photo?

1500200075.english: Where did it come from? It’s our beautiful memory, isn’t it? I’ve been keeping it safe and sound.
1500200075.korean: 어디서 났긴 우리들의 아름다운 추억이잖아?&n내가 소중히 보관하고 있었지.

1500200077.english: Oh my~ No way. Where do you think you're going to take it?

1500200079.english: This reaction... You said you couldn't remember anything back then because of the alcohol... but as expected, you remember everything?
1500200079.korean: 이 반응… 그때는 술 때문에 아무것도 기억나지 않는다고 했는데…&n역시 다 기억하고 있군?

1500200080.english: Omega, you shy, cute little thing. You remember everything, yet you're pretending not to know.
1500200080.korean: 오메가, 이 부끄럼쟁이 귀여운 녀석.&n다 기억하면서 모르는 척이나 하고 말이야.

1500200081.english: That day was really because of the alcohol…! Hmph, never mind. Do as you please.
1500200081.korean: 그날은 정말로 술 때문에…!&n큭, 됐어요. 마음대로 하세요.

1500200082.english: However, you would better be prepared when the photos are released to the public. When that happens, I will make you regret it, even if it means mobilizing everything PECS has.
1500200082.korean: 대신 사진을 시중에 뿌렸을 때는 각오하시는 게 좋을 거예요.&n그때는 정말로 PECS의 모든 걸 동원해서라도 후회하게 만들겠어요.

1500200083.english: He was so cute back then, I wonder how he ended up becoming such a wretched fellow. Well… he was twisted from the start, though.
1500200083.korean: 이때는 참 귀여웠는데 어쩌다 이런 몹쓸 녀석이 되었는지.&n뭐… 처음부터 뒤틀리긴 했지.

1500200084.english: The day the Secretary Lemonades gathered privately for the first and last time... Hmm, I guess it’s not a bad memory after all.
1500200084.korean: 비서 레모네이드들이 사적으로 처음이자 마지막으로 모인 날...&n음, 역시 나쁜 기억은 아니란 말이지.

1500200085.english: Lazy Epsilon didn't even show up... wait, wait, should I say he did come for a different reason? Delta and Zeta just talked about business, and Beta was there to soothe you while you were drinking and whining.
1500200085.korean: 게으른 엡실론은 참석조차 안 했고... 아니지, 다른 의미로 오긴 했다고 봐야 하나?&n델타와 제타는 비즈니스 얘기만 하고&n베타는 술 마시고 질질 짜는 널 달래고 말이야.

1500200086.english: Whether it's a good memory or not, what's the use of it now?
1500200086.korean: 좋은 기억이든 아니든 이제 와서 그게 무슨 소용이죠.

1500200087.english: We can't go back to that time, and there's no reason to go back.
1500200087.korean: 우리는 다시 그때로 돌아갈 수도 돌아갈 이유도 없어요.

1500200088.english: Because I have walked such a long, long road. I will never go back to that time.
1500200088.korean: 너무… 너무나도 멀고 긴 길을 걸어왔으니까요.&n저는 절대로 그때로 돌아가지 않을 거예요.

1500200091.english: You should enjoy this moment just like me. That's all I have to say.
1500200091.korean: 너도 나처럼 이 순간을 즐기라고.&n내가 할말은 이거 뿐이야.

1500200092.english: Alright then, I’m really going now, so do whatever you want with the rest.
1500200092.korean: 자, 그럼 이제 진짜로 갈테니 나머지는 마음대로 해봐.

1500200093.english: I'll be careful just as you advised, so don't worry. There's no way I'd die at the hands of a worthless Iron Bug, right?
1500200093.korean: 네 충고대로 조심할테니 걱정하지는 말고.&n내가 철충 따위에게 뒈질리가 없잖아?

1500200096.english: You're telling me to enjoy the present?

1500200097.english: That is definitely right. Yes, that's right. We should enjoy it.

1500200098.english: But not yet. The time isn't ripe to enjoy it yet.
1500200098.korean: 하지만 아직 아니에요.&n아직 즐기기에는 때가 무르익지 않았어요.

1500200099.english: When I prove that I am above humans and get what I want… only then… will I slowly enjoy it.
1500200099.korean: 제가 인간의 위에 있음을 증명하고 원하는 걸 손에 넣었을 때…&n비로소 그때… 천천히 즐길 거예요.

1500200100.english: Because fruit eaten that way will be the sweetest.
1500200100.korean: 그렇게 먹는 과실이 제일 달콤할 테니까.

1500300004.english: Let's calm down. Nothing will happen. Surely…

1500300006.english: Still, just in case something happens… *sniff*…
1500300006.korean: 그래도, 만에 하나 무슨 일이 벌어진다면…&n히잉…

1500300010.english: Excuse me, I don't have any particular business here. I was just wondering if there are any issues. Like Iron Bugs roaming around or something...
1500300010.korean: 저기, 특별한 용무가 있는 건 아닌데요.&n무슨 문제가 없나 해서요. 철충들이 돌아다닌 다거나…

1500300011.english: [No Iron蟲 movements have been detected around the base so far.]
1500300011.korean: [현재까지 주둔지 주변에서 철충의 움직임은 감지되지 않았습니다.]

1500300012.english: [However, let's not let our guard down. Now that the mysterious fighting between the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) observed until recently has ceased, a significant change in their movements is expected in the near future.]
1500300012.korean: [하지만 방심은 금물. 최근까지 관측되었던 철충끼리의 알 수 없는 싸움이 멈춘 지금, 조만간 움직임에 큰 변화가 있을 것으로 예상됩니다.]

1500300013.english: Is that so... I hope nothing bad happens until Gamma returns...
1500300013.korean: 그런가요…&n감마 님이 돌아오실 때까지 아무 일도 없었으면 좋겠는데…

1500300014.english: Ugh, Lady Merope isn't at Poseidon anymore... and Lady Gamma has gone somewhere else again...
1500300014.korean: 우으, 메로페 님은 이제 포세이돈에 안 계시고...&n감마 님도 또 어디론가 가버리시고…

1500300015.english: Mr. Annihilator, you can't leave me behind. If you disappear from here too, I... just imagining it... *sobbing*
1500300015.korean: 어나이얼레이터 씨는 절 두고 어디 가시면 안 돼요.&n지금 여기서 어나이얼레이터 씨까지 없어지면 저는… 상상만 해도… 후에엥…

1500300016.english: [I am the ship control system AI of Poseidon Industries. Please rest assured that I will not go anywhere.]
1500300016.korean: [저는 포세이돈 인더스트리의 함선 제어 시스템 AI입니다.&n어디로 가버리지 않으니 안심하시기 바랍니다.]

1500300017.english: Also, honorifics are unnecessary for me, so please feel free to speak comfortably.
1500300017.korean: [그리고 저에게 존칭은 불필요하니 편하게 말씀하셔도 괜찮습니다.]

1500300018.english: Then, I’d like you to just call me 'Rhode' too! I guess you could say it makes me feel more comfortable... or maybe friendly...
1500300018.korean: 그럼, 저도 그냥 '로데'라고 불러주시면 좋겠어요!&n그러는 게 마음이 편하다고 할까… 친근하다고 해야 할까…

1500300019.english: [That is not possible. With former Lieutenant Merope having defected to the Orca Resistance and Commander Gamma currently absent, Lord Rhode is the highest-ranking official at Poseidon.]
1500300019.korean: [그럴 수는 없습니다.&n부관이셨던 메로페 님이 오르카 저항군으로 이적하고, 지휘관인 감마 님이 부재중이신 지금&n로데 님은 현재 포세이돈에서 최고 책임자이십니다.]

1500300020.english: D-D-Don't say such things as me being the chief executive! There are many people at Poseidon who are more優秀 than me!
1500300020.korean: 제, 제가 최고 책임자라니 그런 말 마세요~!&n포세이돈에는 저보다 우수하신 분들이 많으신걸요!

1500300021.english: There are powerful AGS members like Mr. Triton, and also Vente! Ah, Vente isn't here anymore, though...
1500300021.korean: 트리톤 씨 같은 강력한 AGS 분들도 계시고 또 벤테도 있고!&n아, 벤테는 이제 이곳에 없지만…

1500300022.english: Anyway, right now I’m just reluctantly holding the command while Lord Gamma is away on his orders!
1500300022.korean: 아무튼, 지금은 감마 님의 명령으로 자리를 비우신 동안 어쩔 수 없이&n지휘권을 맡고 있을 뿐이에요!

1500300023.english: Besides, I haven't been of even a single bit of help to Gamma to the extent of replacing Merope...
1500300023.korean: 그리고, 저는 메로페 님을 대신할 정도로 감마 님에게 아직까지 도움 한 번 된 적 없는걸요...

1500300026.english: [I am merely an AI, but I can make judgments based on data. Judging by the data, Lord Rhode is playing a significant role for Poseidon.]
1500300026.korean: [저는 한낱 AI에 불과하지만, 데이터를 기반한 판단은 할 수 있습니다.&n데이터로 판단컨대 로데 님은 포세이돈에게 있어 큰 활약을 하고 계십니다.]

1500300028.english: [However, it is true that it is not of much help in combat.]
1500300028.korean: [단, 전투에서 큰 도움이 되지 않는 건 사실입니다.]

1500300029.english: Whoa! I guess I'm no help after all, right?
1500300029.korean: 후에엥~! 역시 도움이 안 되는 거죠?

1500300030.english: Poseidon is a combat unit boasting overwhelming firepower... so if they are of no help in battle, it means they are practically non-existent.
1500300030.korean: 포세이돈은 압도적인 화력이 자랑인 전투 부대인데…&n전투에서 도움이 안된다면 그냥 없는 거나 마찬가지인 존재라는 거잖아요.

1500300031.english: [However, Lord Rhode is an indispensable presence in unit operations, which are a non-combat aspect.]
1500300031.korean: [하지만 전투 외 부분인 부대 운영에서 로데 님은 없어서는 안 될 존재입니다.]

1500300032.english: [My former subordinate, Lady Merope, also stated that Lord Rhode played a significant role in keeping Poseidon's system functioning without collapsing, despite it being in disarray before he arrived.]
1500300032.korean: [전 부관이신 메로페 님도 자신이 오기 전 엉망이었던 포세이돈의 체계가, 그나마 무너지지 않고 돌아가고 있던 건 로데 님의 활약이 크다고 말했습니다.]

1500300033.english: Really? Did Merope really say that?

1500300034.english: [I believe that Gamma is also aware of this, which is why he entrusts command to Rhode whenever he is away for a brief moment.]
1500300034.korean: [감마 님 역시 그 부분을 알고 계시기에 잠깐씩 자리를 비우실 때 로데 님에게 지휘를 맡기는 것이라 판단됩니다.]

1500300036.english: [Also, as Lord Rhode is an older individual among Poseidon's bioroids than Lord Gamma, he possesses a great deal of experience.]
1500300036.korean: [그리고 로데님은 포세이돈의 바이오로이드 중, 감마 님보다 연식이 오래된 개체인 만큼 많은 경험을 가지고 계십니다.]

1500300037.english: Mr. Annihilator…? You were just praising me, right? It’s true that I’m an old specimen, but you’re saying I’m still full of energy…?
1500300037.korean: 어나이얼레이터 씨…? 지금 칭찬해 주신 거 맞죠?&n제가 분명 오래된 개체인 건 맞지만, 아직 팔팔...하다고요?

1500300038.english: Still, thank you for telling me. Thanks to you, I feel a little more confident.
1500300038.korean: 그래도 말씀해 주셔서 고마워요.&n덕분에 조금은 자신이 붙었어요.

1500300039.english: Mr. Annihilator is right. I made a firm resolution from that day... ever since Gamma took me in when I was scheduled to be discarded after the experiment ended.
1500300039.korean: 어나이얼레이터 씨의 말씀이 맞아요.&n그날... 실험이 종료되고 폐기 예정이었던 저를 감마 님이 거두어주셨을 때부터 굳게 결심했어요.

1500300040.english: I said I would do my best to do whatever it takes to be of help to Gamma.
1500300040.korean: 감마 님의 도움이 되기 위해 무엇이든 최선을 다해 노력하겠다고요.

1500300041.english: I'm not much help yet, but someday I want to become an indispensable presence to Gamma, just like Merope!
1500300041.korean: 아직까지는 큰 도움이 되고 있지는 않지만, 언젠가는 메로페 님처럼 감마 님에게 없어서는 안 될 존재가 되고 싶어요!

1500300042.english: What did the little kid and I do?

1500300044.english: Why are you so surprised? Were you talking behind my back?
1500300044.korean: 뭘, 그렇게 놀라고 그래?&n내 뒷담이라도 하고 있었나?

1500300045.english: G-Gamma! It's nothing! When did you return?
1500300045.korean: 감, 감마 님! 아무것도 아니예요!&n언제 돌아오셨어요?

1500300046.english: I just got back. Didn't you receive it from the Annihilator?

1500300047.english: I wasn't told at all! Mr. Annihilator! Why didn't you let me know that Gamma had returned!?
1500300047.korean: 전혀 전달받지 않았어요!&n어나이얼레이터 씨! 왜 감마 님이 돌아오셨다고 안 알려주신 거예요!?

1500300048.english: [Excuse me, I didn't have the timing to pass this on.]

1500300049.english: Lies! You definitely did it on purpose!

1500300050.english: I'm not entirely sure, but it looks like nothing happened while I was away.
1500300050.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만, 보아하니 내가 자리를 비운 사이 아무 일도 없었나 보군.

1500300051.english: Oh, yes! There haven't been any special movements from the Iron Bugs so far.
1500300051.korean: 앗, 네! 아직까지는 철충들의 특별한 움직임은 없었어요.

1500300052.english: Hmm, I thought there might be some big move soon, but contrary to my expectations, it's quiet. I don't like it.
1500300052.korean: 흠, 조만간 큰 움직임이 있지 않을까 생각했는데 예상과 다르게 얌전하군.&n마음에 안들어.

1500300053.english: Just a short while ago they were sweeping through Anchorage, then suddenly they started fighting amongst themselves, and now they've gone quiet as if nothing happened.
1500300053.korean: 불과 얼마 전까지만 해도 앵커리지를 휩쓸더니 갑자기 자기들끼리 싸워대고 이번에는 아무 일도 없다는 듯 잠잠해지고 말이야.

1500300054.english: I just can't figure out what they're thinking. ...I don't even know if those Iron Bugs have any brains in the first place.
1500300054.korean: 도통 생각을 모르겠단 말이지.&n...애초에 철충 녀석들한테 생각이란 게 있는 지 모르겠다만.

1500300055.english: Well, fine. Anyway, the work remains the same, so shall I start getting ready?
1500300055.korean: 뭐, 좋아.&n어찌 됐든 할 일에는 변함이 없으니 슬슬 준비해 볼까.

1500300056.english: Rhode, get ready. I’m heading out to wipe out those Iron蟲s as soon as I’m ready. Let’s go pay off the debt of the unit that was wiped out at Anchorage.
1500300056.korean: 로데, 준비가 끝나는 대로 철충 녀석들을 쓸어버리러 나갈 테니 정비 해놔.&n앵커리지에서 전멸했던 부대의 빚을 대신 갚아주러 가보자고.

1500300057.english: If that kid, the subordinate, had been here, he would have prepared everything in advance without me having to say anything... but I guess it's no use arguing with someone who isn't here.
1500300057.korean: 부관 꼬맹이가 있었더라면 말하지 않아도 미리 준비를 해놨을 테지만... 없는 녀석에게 따져봤자 소용없나.

1500300058.english: Excuse me... Gamma. The unit is already ready for sortie. We can depart immediately at any time if you wish.
1500300058.korean: 저기… 감마 님. 부대 출격 준비라면 이미 완료됐어요.&n원하시면 언제라도 바로 출발할 수 있어요.

1500300060.english: What? Oh, um, I mean... the unit is already ready for sortie.
1500300060.korean: 네? 앗, 저, 그러니까... 부대 출격 준비라면 이미 완료됐어요.

1500300061.english: What do you mean by saying the sortie preparations are already complete?
1500300061.korean: 출격 준비가 이미 끝났다니 그게 무슨 소리야?

1500300062.english: Um, well... when I say that sortie preparations are complete... literally... I mean that sortie preparations are complete...
1500300062.korean: 저, 그게… 출격 준비가 끝났다는 건... 말 그대로... 출격 준비가 끝났다는 의미로…

1500300063.english: Does that mean they finished preparing in advance without me even instructing them to? Why did they prepare it in advance?
1500300063.korean: 내가 지시하지도 않았는데 미리 준비를 끝내놨다는 건가?&n왜 미리 준비한 거지?

1500300064.english: Well... if it were Merope... she would have done that.
1500300064.korean: 그게... 메로페 님이라면... 그렇게 하셨을 테니까요.

1500300066.english: Yes, I always watched over you from the side while you were here, Merope.
1500300066.korean: 네, 메로페 님이 계시는 동안 항상 옆에서 지켜봤거든요.

1500300067.english: I thought Merope's accurate and fast work processing was cool... so I admired her and wished I could be like that too.
1500300067.korean: 메로페 님의 정확하고 빠른 업무 처리가 멋지다고 생각해서… 저도 그렇게 될 수 있다면 좋겠다고 동경했어요.

1500300068.english: So, while I kept a close eye on how Merope worked...
1500300068.korean: 그래서 메로페 님이 어떻게 일을 하는지 계속해서 눈여겨보다가…

1500300069.english: So, I followed the way the little kid I've watched for a long time does it?
1500300069.korean: 오랫동안 지켜본 꼬맹이의 방식을 따라 했다, 그런 건가.

1500300072.english: Hahaha, you little brat! I don't know if you planned this, but to think you'd leave a gift like this.
1500300072.korean: 하하하, 꼬맹이 녀석! 노린 건지는 모르겠지만, 이런 선물을 남겨두고 갈 줄이야.

1500300073.english: Okay, Rhode. You are my temporary lieutenant until the next one is decided.
1500300073.korean: 좋아, 로데.&n다음 부관이 정해질 때까지 네가 내 임시 부관이다.

1500300078.english: Even though it's temporary, it's the same spot as the little kid you admire. How about that? Are you happy?
1500300078.korean: 임시이긴 해도 네가 동경하는 꼬맹이 녀석과 같은 자리다.&n어때 기쁘냐?

1500300079.english: Like Lady Merope… Lady Gamma’s adjutant…
1500300079.korean: 메로페 님과 같은… 감마 님의 부관…

1500300080.english: ...Will I be able to do well?

1500300081.english: It depends on you. That's why it's 'temporary,' isn't it? Just so you know, if you're not satisfactory, you'll be fired immediately.
1500300081.korean: 그거야 네가 하기 나름이지.&n그러니까 '임시' 아니겠어? 참고로 시원치 않으면 바로 모가지다.

1500300083.english: ...Still, I'll give it a try! I'll do anything if it can be of help to Gamma!
1500300083.korean: ...그래도, 해보겠어요!&n감마 님에게 도움이 될 수 있다면 뭐든지 할 거예요!

1500300084.english: Haha, good! It's very energetic, so I like it.
1500300084.korean: 하핫, 좋아! 아주 활기차서 마음에 들어.

1500300085.english: [Reporting from Gamma. Numerous Iron蟲 movements have been detected near the base. The numbers are 26, 40, 56… and are steadily increasing.]
1500300085.korean: [감마 님 보고드립니다. 주둔지 근처에서 철충의 움직임이 다수 감지되었습니다.&n수는 26, 40, 56… 점점 늘어나고 있습니다.]

1500300086.english: [If things continue like this, an attack on the base is predicted to begin.]
1500300086.korean: [이대로 간다면 주둔지를 향한 공격이 시작될 것으로 예측됩니다.]

1500300087.english: Hehe, what is this? That move as if you were waiting for me? Good, this is the fun part.
1500300087.korean: 크크, 뭐야? 마치 날 기다리고 있었다는 듯한 움직임은?&n좋아, 이렇게 나와야 재밌지.

1500300088.english: Rhode, this is my first operation as a temporary adjutant. Let's wipe out every single one of those Iron Bugs that dare to challenge us.
1500300088.korean: 로데, 임시 부관으로서의 첫 작전이다.&n겁 없이 덤비는 철충 녀석들을 모조리 쓸어버리자고.

1500300089.english: What!? Just like this, so suddenly!? I'm not mentally prepared yet!
1500300089.korean: 네!? 이렇게 갑자기요!?&n아직 마음의 준비가 안됐는데~!

1500300090.english: You're supposed to learn things like this in real-life situations. Try to put what you learned from the little one to good use.
1500300090.korean: 원래 이런 건 실전에서 배우는 법이야.&n꼬맹이에게 배운 것들을 잘 써먹어보라고.

1500300091.english: Let me tell you in advance: now that you are my adjutant, no mistakes will be tolerated!
1500300091.korean: 미리 말하지만, 내 부관이 된 이상 실수는 용납되지 않는다!

1500400001.english: - Several months have passed since Beta joined Orca in Caracas.
1500400001.korean: - 카라카스에서 베타가 오르카에 합류하고서 몇 달이라는 시간이 흘렀다.

1500400002.english: During that time, there were encounters with various bioroids and also crises.
1500400002.korean: - 그동안 다양한 바이오로이드와의 만남이 있었고 위기도 있었다.

1500400003.english: Recently, they even pushed ahead with a somewhat unreasonable operation of an all-out war against the Poseidon fleet.
1500400003.korean: - 최근에는 포세이돈 함대와 전면전이라는 조금 무리한 작전도 강행했다.

1500400004.english: Besides that, there were countless other things too long to explain in their entirety, but we still survived.
1500400004.korean: - 그 밖에도 전부 설명하기에는 기나긴 무수히도 많은 일들이 있었지만, 여전히 우리는 살아남았다.

1500400005.english: The important thing is the fact that it is alive.

1500400006.english: Being alive means there is a 'next'.

1500400007.english: Because having a next step means that as we grow little by little, there is a 'path forward'.
1500400007.korean: - 다음이 있다는 것은 우리가 조금씩 성장하며 '나아갈 길'이 있다는 거니까.

1500400008.english: I do not know whether the path ahead will be easy and smooth, or difficult and rugged, but…
1500400008.korean: - 앞으로 나아갈 이 길이 쉽고 순탄한 길일지, 아니면 어렵고 험난한 길일지는 알 수 없지만…

1500400009.english: We will do our best to struggle and continue to survive.
1500400009.korean: - 우리는 최선을 다해 발버둥 치며 계속해서 살아남을 것이다.

1500400010.english: - In order to do that, first…

1500400011.english: Commander, here is the list of AGSs produced this month. I'd like you to check it.
1500400011.korean: 사령관, 이게 이번 달에 생산된 AGS들의 리스트야. 확인해 줬으면 좋겠거든?

1500400012.english: And we're considering adding a new AGS production line, you know? If you could approve that too, I think I'd be really happy, big sister.
1500400012.korean: 그리고 새로운 AGS의 생산 라인 추가를 고려하고 있거든?&n이것도 같이 승인해 주면, 누나 정말로 기쁠 것 같거든?

1500400015.english: As the captain of the Empress Hound, I cannot turn a blind eye to the mistakes of our unit members, so I have come to report this.
1500400015.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드의 대장으로서 저희 부대원 실책을 못 본체할 수 없어 보고드리러 왔습니다.

1500400016.english: Hey! I'm telling you, I'm not the culprit! Those little brats said there was a warehouse full of gold, so I just went to take a look!
1500400016.korean: 야! 그러니까 나는 범인이 아니라니까!&n그 꼬맹이들이 창고에 황금이 잔뜩 쌓여 있다고 해서, 그냥 한번 구경하러 가본 것뿐이라고!

1500400017.english: If you just went to look around, why did you cause a power outage in the warehouse?
1500400017.korean: 구경하러 가본 것뿐이라면, 왜 창고에서 정전을 일으켰지?

1500400018.english: That’s because… those little brats said they would give us the gold in the warehouse if we caused a power outage…
1500400018.korean: 그건… 그 꼬맹이들이 정전을 일으켜주면 창고의 황금을 주겠다고 했으니까…

1500400019.english: It is not worth saying any more. You are an accomplice who aided the culprits of the warehouse raid. Blinded by gold, you have tarnished the honor of the Empressis Hound, so you will have to pay the price.
1500400019.korean: 더 말할 가치가 없군. 너는 창고 습격 사건의 범인들을 도운 공범이다.&n황금에 눈이 멀어 엠프레시스 하운드의 명예를 실추시켰으니 그 대가를 치뤄야 할 거다.

1500400020.english: Eeeeeek! I told you it's not!

1500400022.english: Your Excellency, although it has been delayed a bit, I would like to conduct the Steel Line maritime rescue training that was requested a few months ago.
1500400022.korean: 각하, 좀 늦어졌지만 몇 달 전에 신청한 스틸 라인 해상 구조 훈련을 실시하고자 합니다.

1500400023.english: The weather has gotten a bit colder, but that's fine. Our Steel Line unit members aren't afraid to go into the water no matter the weather.
1500400023.korean: 날씨가 조금 추워지긴 했지만 괜찮습니다.&n저희 스틸 라인 부대원들은 그 어떤 날씨에도 물에 들어가는 걸 두려워하지 않으니까요.

1500400025.english: Yay! Long time no see, Captain! Triaina is back from her South American island expedition!
1500400025.korean: 야호~! 캡틴 오랜만이야! 트리아이나가 남미 섬 탐험에서 돌아왔어!

1500400026.english: Wow, there were so many wonderful things on this adventure! So, I have something to tell you about the adventure story and the next destination to explore…
1500400026.korean: 이야~ 이번 모험도 참 멋진 일들이 많았다구!&n그래서 모험 이야기랑 다음 탐험 목적지에 대해서 말할 게 있는데…

1500400027.english: Sister~! The Commander is busy right now! Let's come back later.
1500400027.korean: 언니~! 사령관님은 지금 바쁘시잖아요!&n저희는 나중에 다시 오기로 해요.

1500400028.english: Oh, hey, you… it’s been a while. Hehe, I’m so glad to see you again like this.
1500400028.korean: 앗, 저기, 당신… 오랜만이야.&n후후, 당신을 이렇게 다시 보게 돼서 정말 기뻐.

1500400029.english: I really enjoyed the adventure with you, unnie. I'll come visit you again when I have time later. There are so many things I want to talk to you about.
1500400029.korean: 언니와의 모험은 정말 즐거웠어.&n나중에 시간이 될 때 다시 찾아갈게. 당신이랑 이야기 하고 싶은 게 정말 많거든.

1500400032.english: They are planning to start a riot, claiming that the AGS are not keeping their promises!
1500400032.korean: AGS들이 공약을 지키지 않는다며 폭동을 일으키려고 합니다요!

1500400033.english: At this rate, your position as the representative of AGS is in danger!
1500400033.korean: 이대로 가면 AGS 대표로서의 자리가 위험합니다요~!

1500400035.english: Master! Haven't you seen Sister Alcyone!?

1500400036.english: Ugh! Alcyone stole the pudding I was saving to eat later! I even wrote Merope's name on it!
1500400036.korean: 우씨! 알키오네 언니가 내가 나중에 먹으려고 아껴두었던 푸딩을 훔쳐먹었어!&n메로페 거라고 이름까지 적어놨는데!

1500400037.english: They even stuck a piece of paper on the empty pudding container saying it was delicious…! How could they play such a prank!
1500400037.korean: 다 먹은 푸딩 용기 껍데기에 맛있게 잘 먹었다고 종이까지 붙여놓고…!&n이런 장난을 치다니!

1500400038.english: The culprit is definitely Alcyone! She's the only one who would do something like this!
1500400038.korean: 틀림없이 범인은 알키오네 언니야!&n이런 짓을 할 사람은 알키오네 언니밖에 없으니까!

1500400039.english: I will never forgive you…! Pudding’s enemy! This chilling sensation surging from deep within my chest… Hahaha, it’s been a while…
1500400039.korean: 절대로 용서 못 해…! 푸딩의 원수!&n가슴 깊숙한 곳에서 솟구쳐 오르는 이 서늘한 감각… 후후후, 오랜만이야…

1500400040.english: Master, help me find Sister Alcyone! Pudding's grudge! I'll make her pay dearly!
1500400040.korean: 주인님, 알키오네 언니를 찾는걸 도와줘!&n푸딩의 원한! 똑똑히 치르게 해주겠어!

1500400042.english: Hello, Commander. Have you been well?

1500400043.english: Thanks to you, Commander, the therapy room is always bustling with visiting members. I am always grateful for you providing a place for me to stay.
1500400043.korean: 사령관님 덕분에 테라피 치료실은 언제나 찾아오는 대원들로 북적거리고 있어요.&n저에게 있을 장소를 마련해 주신 일에는 늘 감사드려요.

1500400044.english: Um... I came to see you today, Commander, for a different reason...
1500400044.korean: 저... 오늘 사령관님을 찾아온 건 다른 이유가 있어서인데요…

1500400045.english: I understand that a proposal for a facility recently passed the City Guard's review, and I was wondering when it will be available for use…
1500400045.korean: 얼마 전에 한 시설에 대한 기획안이 시티 가드의 심의를 통과한 걸로 알고 있는데&n그 시설이 언제부터 이용할 수 있게 되는지 궁금해서…

1500400046.english: Um! I didn't mean to say I wanted you to rush it or anything! Well... there are a lot of customers waiting, and I'm also full of anticipation, but...
1500400046.korean: 저! 서둘러 만들어 줬으면 좋겠다던가 그런 의미는 아니에요!&n그야… 기다리고 있는 손님들도 많고 저 역시 많은 기대에 부풀어 있지만...

1500400047.english: Since Lord Sadius also mentioned that he would come on patrol every day... I was wondering if everyone... is just eagerly counting down the days until the Commander's arrival...
1500400047.korean: 사디어스 님도 매일 순찰을 오시겠다고 말씀하시기도 했으니...&n모두가... 사령관님의 걸음만을 손꼽아 기다리고 있는 게 아닐까, 해서요...

1500400050.english: Master? You are trembling; are you feeling unwell? There were indeed an unusually large number of visitors today, but...
1500400050.korean: 주인님? 몸을 떨고 계신데 어디 편찮으신가요?&n오늘은 유난히 찾아온 분들이 많긴 했습니다만…

1500400052.english: I was worrying for nothing. I am relieved to see you acting like your usual self.
1500400052.korean: 제가 괜한 걱정을 했군요.&n평소의 주인님의 모습이라 안심입니다.

1500400053.english: Master? What's wrong? You're suddenly staring at me intently...
1500400053.korean: 주인님? 왜 그러세요?&n갑자기 저를 빤히 쳐다보시고…

1500400054.english: Yes, that is absolutely true. You have no idea how much I struggled to get back to my original way of speaking...
1500400054.korean: 네, 정말로 그 말대로예요.&n원래의 말투로 돌아오는데 얼마나 고생을 했는지…

1500400055.english: There was even a child bioroid that ended up crying because of Delta's unconscious use of her tone. It was really hard to comfort her while she was crying.
1500400055.korean: 무의식적으로 사용한 델타의 말투 때문에 울려버린 어린이 바이오로이드도 있었다고요.&n우는 걸 달래는데 정말 힘들었어요.

1500400056.english: It's okay, I've gotten used to it by now. Still, Delta's way of speaking might slip out unintentionally every now and then.
1500400056.korean: 괜찮아요, 이제 익숙해졌으니까요.&n그래도 간혹 무심결에 델타의 말투가 나올지도 모르겠네요.

1500400057.english: Well then, since you seem full of energy, would you like to continue working if you really wish? There are still mountains of matters requiring your assistance, Commander. I will make an exception and let it slide just for today.
1500400057.korean: 그럼, 기운도 넘쳐 보이시니 그렇게 정 원하시면 계속해서 업무를 보시겠어요?&n사령관님의 도움이 필요한 안건은 아직 산처럼 쌓여있으니까요.&n오늘만큼은 특별히 넘어가 드릴게요.

1500400058.english: Just as it has been until now, work at Orca continues today.
1500400058.korean: - 지금까지 그래왔던 것처럼, 오늘도 오르카에서의 업무는 계속된다.

1500400059.english: After handling all the constant requests for help from the team members for a while, all the light tasks were finished.
1500400059.korean: - 한동안 끊임없이 찾아오는 대원들의 도움 요청을 전부 해결하니, 가벼운 내용의 업무는 전부 끝났다.

1500400060.english: From now on, the content is a bit heavy. We need to reconsider Orca's future course of action.
1500400060.korean: - 이제부터는 조금 무거운 내용. 앞으로의 오르카 행동방침에 대해 다시 한번 생각해야 한다.

1500400061.english: So, before we begin, let me summarize the situation of the Lemonades following the Caracas incident in South America.
1500400061.korean: 그럼 시작하기 앞서, 남미에서 벌어졌던 카라카스 사건 이후 레모네이드들의 상황을 한 번 정리할게요.

1500400062.english: Despite the twists and turns, Beta safely joined Orca, and we also managed to secure part of South America.
1500400062.korean: 우여곡절이 있었지만 베타가 무사히 오르카에 합류했고, 남미의 일부도 손에 넣게 되었어요.

1500400063.english: Thanks to this, a large number of bioroids joined the Orca Resistance, and while not as much as in Europe, they secured a significant amount of infrastructure resources.
1500400063.korean: 덕분에 다수의 바이오로이드가 오르카 저항군에 합류했고 유럽만큼은 아니지만, 많은 인프라 자원을 손에 넣었어요.

1500400064.english: Unlike Delta, this area has been well-managed from the start, so it seems the original residents, the bioroids, have adapted without much difficulty.
1500400064.korean: 델타 때와 다르게 원래부터 관리가 잘 되어 왔던 지역이라 원래 주민이었던 바이오로이드도 큰 무리 없이 적응을 한 모양이에요.

1500400065.english: Separately from this... unfortunately, Beta's Kestos Himas ended up being handed over to Omega. An Omega would surely have modified Beta's to a significant extent to suit their own tastes.
1500400065.korean: 이와 별개로... 아쉽게도 오메가에게는 베타의 케스토스 히마스를 넘겨주게 되었어요.&n오메가라면 분명, 베타의 것을 상당 부분 자기 취향에 맞게 개조했을 테죠.

1500400066.english: Likewise, Beta was given the Kestos Himas taken from Omega, but considering Omega's interference influence, there are many risks involved in using it rashly.
1500400066.korean: 마찬가지로 베타에게는 오메가에게 빼앗은 케스토스 히마스를 주었지만, 오메가의 간섭 영향력을 생각하면 섣불리 사용하기에는 위험 요소가 다분해요.

1500400067.english: So you're saying I should avoid using Omega's Kestos Himas unless absolutely necessary...
1500400067.korean: - 꼭 필요한 상황이 아니라면 오메가의 케스토스 히마스를 사용하는 건 피해야 한다는 건가…

1500400068.english: According to an agent conducting intelligence operations in North America, no special movements have been observed so far.
1500400068.korean: 북미에서 첩보 활동 중인 대원의 말에 의하면, 아직까지 특별한 움직임이 보이진 않는다고 합니다.

1500400069.english: If we go further inside, we might be able to find out more, but the security is so tight that we are having great difficulty getting in.
1500400069.korean: 좀 더 내부로 들어간다면 알아낼 수 있는 게 더 있을지도 모르지만, 보안이 상당해서 진입에 큰 어려움을 겪고 있어요.

1500400070.english: It takes a little more time to obtain meaningful information.
1500400070.korean: 유의미한 정보를 얻기 위해선 조금 더 시간이 필요해요.

1500400071.english: Shepherd is in North America right now, too. We’ve made preparations so he can provide immediate assistance just in case, but I really hope nothing goes wrong…
1500400071.korean: - 북미에는 지금 셰퍼드도 가 있다.&n만일을 대비해서 바로 도움을 줄 수 있도록 대비는 해놓았지만 아무일도 없으면 좋겠는데…

1500400073.english: - Next is a guy I met just a short while ago…
1500400073.korean: - 다음은 바로 얼마 전에 만났던 녀석인데…

1500400074.english: Yeah! After the last operation ended, as I was seeing you off, I kept prying into what you were going to do in the future.
1500400074.korean: 응! 지난 작전이 끝나고 대장님을 배웅하면서 내가 계속 앞으로 뭐 하실 건지 꼬치꼬치 물어봤거든.

1500400075.english: Then they said that the movements of the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) on the northern front have changed, so they will focus there for the time being. From what I heard, it seems there were some incidents of the Iron蟲 fighting each other in the north as well.
1500400075.korean: 그랬더니 북부 전선의 철충들의 움직임이 달라졌으니 당분간은 그곳에 집중한다고 그랬어.&n듣기로는 북부에서도 철충끼리 서로 싸우는 일이 있었던 것 같아.

1500400076.english: The Captain wouldn't lie about something like this, so it must be true, Arthur.
1500400076.korean: 대장님이 이런 일로 거짓말을 할리는 없으니까 틀림없을 거야 아서.

1500400077.english: - The fact that the Iron蟲's movements have changed is concerning. It might be related to the fight between the Iron蟲s I saw at the Iron Tower last time…
1500400077.korean: - 철충의 움직임이 달라졌다는 부분은 신경이 쓰인다. 지난번 철의 탑에서 보았던 철충끼리의 싸움과 관련된 일일지도…

1500400078.english: Ehh~ Don't make a big deal out of this~ I know how to separate work and personal life, you know?
1500400078.korean: 에이~ 뭘 이런걸 가지고~ 나도 공과 사는 구분할 줄 안다고?

1500400079.english: Just so you know, personal matters come first for me, too, Captain.
1500400079.korean: 참고로 나도 대장님과 마찬가지로 사적인 일이 우선이야.
